programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Unable to swing working from home any longer, Harper returns to a rapidly changing and intensifying atmosphere at Pierpoint.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Harper's decision to pursue Bloom over Felim exposes larger issues between her, Eric and the account.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: The high of landing Bloom soon wears off when Harper suddenly finds herself stuck between rivals at Rican Healthcare's investor event and at the mercy of Eric's frustration.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Reeling from the Felim fallout, Eric takes some time to reassess his next move. While continuing to reap the rewards of closing Bloom as a client, Harper begins to grow closer to Danny.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: After learning of Yasmin and Jackie's impending trip to Berlin, Harper attempts to land an invite for more than just business reasons.

programme.title: Industry
programme.sub-title: Short To The Point Of Pain
programme.desc: When a group of online traders attempt a short squeeze of FastAide, Bloom takes it personally, while a recently AWOL Harper suddenly fears the future of their working relationship.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: After receiving confirmation that the London office will merge with New York, Harper, Eric, and Rishi team up to pitch their small global force to rival banks.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: As she chases a life-changing opportunity at Shogun, Harper receives an unexpected test from Bloom.

programme.title: Industry
programme.sub-title: Il Mattino Ha L'oro In Boca
programme.desc: Pierpoint prepares to extend its first offer. Robert faces some challenges in working with Lumi's CEO.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: After a rocky start, Pierpoint does everything it can to ensure that Lumi becomes successful on the stock market.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Eric, Yasmin, and Robert showcase Pierpoint's shift to ethical investing at the COP Climate Conference. However, Harper's disruptive stunt jeopardises Lumi's market support.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Deeply in debt with a new home and baby, Rishi takes a huge gamble after an old friend's surprise visit. He later risks his job at Pierpoint for another high-stakes opportunity.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: After being summoned by a government select committee, Robert worries he's become a pawn in a much larger battle between very powerful entities.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Invigorated by LeviathanAlpha's success, Harper pitches an idea to Petra that finds them visiting London's top financial institutions, including Pierpoint. Later, Yasmin leans on Harper.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: When a crisis interrupts Pierpoint's 150th anniversary celebrations, the team works through the night to avert a disaster.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: As a new era dawns at Pierpoint, Yasmin and Robert head to the countryside; Harper reaches a turning point in her career.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: As a new era dawns at Pierpoint, Yasmin and Robert head to the countryside; Harper reaches a turning point in her career.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Surviving the fallout from a meltdown, ACN News Night anchor Will McAvoy returns to his job and finds that his executive producer and most of his entire staff are leaving his show. Will learns he's been assigned a new EP: MacKenzie McHale, a former girlfriend. Will and his overhauled staff face an immediate challenge when breaking news comes over the wire.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Mac asserts control over the new incarnation of News Night and enlists a beautiful and brainy on-air economist, Sloan Sabbith, to do a nightly segment. Jim takes the fall for a Maggie miscue, Charlie forbids Reese from continuing his furtive meetings with Will and a long-festering breakup secret gets out.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: In an on-air editorial, Will apologises for past newscasts and promises a new era of integrity for News Night. Will's new approach rankles Leona Lansing, CEO of ACN's parent company Atlantis World Media, who warns Charlie that Will's stance will not be tolerated. Jim soothes Maggie during a panic attack and Will parades a string of arm-candy dates in front of Mac.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will's 'mission to civilise' takes a hit when he finds himself in the tabloid spotlight. Wade approaches Will with info on the government's flagging ability to fight financial crime; Don gets Maggie to fix Jim up with her roommate, Lisa. Sloan strikes out as a matchmaker and Neal's "Bigfoot is real" pitch falls on deaf ears. Against Reese's wishes, Will refuses to follow the media rumour mill and make a call on a breaking story.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: In the midst of its coverage of the ouster of Egyptian President Mubarak, the News Night team learns of a protest in Wisconsin condemning Gov. Scott Walker's bill to balance the budget by cutting teachers' jobs. As Maggie, Jim and Don hustle to get side-by-side views of the simultaneous uprisings on air, Neal tracks down an Egyptian insider, who can get on-the-ground updates from Cairo.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: A lingering bout with insomnia drives Will to keep a long-standing therapy appointment. Subbing for Elliot during the Japanese nuclear crisis, Sloan's strident interrogation of a Tokyo power company spokesperson ends up jeopardising her own career. After his rough handling of an interview subject, Will comes to recognise the causes and effects of being a bully.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: An anonymous source contacts Charlie and provides advance details on an imminent story of national importance. When news breaks that the president will be making a televised speech that night, the 2.0 staff cuts short its one-year (and one week) anniversary party and rushes back to the newsroom amid a flurry of speculation as to what exactly happened.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: News Night's refusal to lead with a pair of sensational stories causes ratings to plummet - and forces Will and Mac to abandon their principles in order to lure back viewers and shore up the network's bid to land a Republican debate. Will auditions an unlikely scribe, Brian Brenner, to write an all-access profile. Charlie learns the identity of an NSA whistleblower, and Neal pitches an internet sting.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will and the News Night staff stage a mock debate for a pair of Republican Party officials. Mac has an epiphany during a power outage, Charlie vets the credibility of an NSA insider, and Lisa goes off-script during an on-air interview.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: In the season finale, Nina Howard surprises Mac with a damning revelation. Jim and Maggie reach a crossroad, Sloan weighs a new job offer, and Neal uses his internet alter ego to smoke out a threat. Will, Mac, and Charlie face off with Leona and Reese during a tension-filled lunch meeting.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Surviving the fallout from a meltdown, ACN News Night anchor Will McAvoy returns to his job and finds that his executive producer and most of his entire staff are leaving his show. programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will and the News Night staff stage a mock debate for a pair of Republican Party officials. Mac has an epiphany during a power outage, Charlie vets the credibility of an NSA insider, and Lisa goes off-script during an on-air interview.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: In the season finale, Nina Howard surprises Mac with a damning revelation. Jim and Maggie reach a crossroad, Sloan weighs a new job offer, and Neal uses his internet alter ego to smoke out a threat. Will, Mac, and Charlie face off with Leona and Reese during a tension-filled lunch meeting.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.sub-title: First Thing We Do, Let's Kill All The Lawyers
programme.desc: Will and the staff are questioned by their lawyer about an ACN story that's become a network crisis.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: A tip on a story that will ultimately cripple the network starts to become more real. MacKenzie and Sloan continue to push Will on drones as Don urges Will to advocate for Troy Davis. Maggie is un-friended by her roommate, but gets the assignment she's been begging for. Neal gets arrested on Wall Street.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will continues his mission to civilise by telling Nina Howard the truth. A new witness to the Genoa story emerges on Twitter, and in New Hampshire, Jim's efforts to have his questions answered continue to fall on deaf ears.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Maggie tries to convince Rebecca she's fine following her shattering trip to Africa with Gary. An Occupy Wall Street protester with a Black Op lead refuses to cooperate with Neal and Jerry after an on-air interview with Will goes poorly. Jim lands Hallie a one-on-one but gets heat from Mac as a result.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will is distracted during his telecast by a phone call and an unflattering twitter post. Charlie gets a visit from a longtime friend from the Office of Naval Intelligence, who has knowledge of Operation Genoa. Sloan phases from humiliation to rage following a revenge posting. The newsroom traverses the slippery slope separating fact from fiction.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Mac and Charlie score a key witness, a retired Marine general, in their attempt to corroborate Dantana's Operation Genoa story. Will follows Nina's lead to soften his image by making an impromptu appearance on a morning talk show. Jim gets unexpected company during his reunion with Hallie, who's in town to cover a Romney rally.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Through depositions with the newsroom staff, Rebecca pieces together the events that led to ACN's fateful decision to go forward with Dantana's special report on Operation Genoa - as well as the post-air revelations that undermined its credibility. The repercussions threaten to ruin News Night while eclipsing breaking news during another 9/11 anniversary.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: In the wake of Leona's refusal to accept the resignations of three top ACN talents, News Night goes forward with its 2012 election-night coverage, with Will in the unlikely role of Director of Morale. Sloan is perturbed that her book was auctioned off with a forged signature, while Mac tasks Neal to fix a faulty Wikipedia page. Mindful that Charlie wants a screw-up-free evening, Jim weighs the cons of retracting a call he made too soon. The team deliberates whether to hold off on a story that might impact a tight Senate race.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: As Election Night 2012 winds down, Will and Charlie await a decision from Reese that may impact their future at ACN, and that of the entire senior staff. Sloan learns the identity of the anonymous winning bidder for her book. Don discusses a countersuit against Dantana with Rebecca. Neal turns to Hallie for help giving Mac a parting gift. Jim tries to make peace with Lisa, encouraging Maggie to do the same and Will has a revelation while Charlie is sharing his.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will, Mac and the news team are reporting a breaking story in Boston, a strategy that may enhance credibility, if not ratings. Neal faces a slippery slope when he's contacted by an anonymous source in possession of stolen government documents revealing how false press stories planted in newspapers spawned fatal riots in Kundu while Sloan looks to solve a takeover puzzle. Meanwhile, Maggie is forced to pinch-hit for Elliot in the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will tries to protect Neal while Reese's half-siblings look to cash in on a hostile takeover gambit.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Leona and Reece look to raise cash in order to salvage ACN and thwart Blair and Randy while Will gets a surprise at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Meanwhile, Charlie trades visions with ACN suitor Lucas Pruit.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Facing a court subpoena and possible incarceration for contempt, Will stands firm in his refusal to reveal the source of the stolen DOD documents. Meanwhile, Charlie's distain for Lucas reaches a fever pitch while Sloan and Mac scramble to find a more acceptable, 11th-hour buyer for ACN.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Incarcerated for contempt, Will refuses to reveal the name of Neal's government source. Appearing to embrace Pruit's mandate to capture younger viewers, Charlie orders a reluctant Don to track down principals in a sexual abuse case at an elite college. Meanwhile, Sloan voices her objection to a new digital site built by Neal's replacement, Bree.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.sub-title: What Kind Of Day Has It Been
programme.desc: A colleague's death leads Will and Mac to ponder the milestones that transformed the newsroom, and to look ahead towards ACN's uncertain future. Meanwhile, Maggie lands a field producer interview in Washington while Neal's digital site is shut down for repairs.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.sub-title: First Thing We Do, Let's Kill All The Lawyers
programme.desc: Will and the staff are questioned by their lawyer about an ACN story that's become a network crisis.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: A tip on a story that will ultimately cripple the network starts to become more real. MacKenzie and Sloan continue to push Will on drones as Don urges Will to advocate for Troy Davis. Maggie is un-friended by her roommate, but gets the assignment she's been begging for. Neal gets arrested on Wall Street.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will continues his mission to civilise by telling Nina Howard the truth. A new witness to the Genoa story emerges on Twitter, and in New Hampshire, Jim's efforts to have his questions answered continue to fall on deaf ears.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: As Election Night 2012 winds down, Will and Charlie await a decision from Reese that may impact their future at ACN, and that of the entire senior staff. Sloan learns the identity of the anonymous winning bidder for her book. Don discusses a countersuit against Dantana with Rebecca. Neal turns to Hallie for help giving Mac a parting gift. Jim tries to make peace with Lisa, encouraging Maggie to do the same and Will has a revelation while Charlie is sharing his.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will, Mac and the news team are reporting a breaking story in Boston, a strategy that may enhance credibility, if not ratings. Neal faces a slippery slope when he's contacted by an anonymous source in possession of stolen government documents revealing how false press stories planted in newspapers spawned fatal riots in Kundu while Sloan looks to solve a takeover puzzle. Meanwhile, Maggie is forced to pinch-hit for Elliot in the aftermath of the Boston Marathon bombings.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Will tries to protect Neal while Reese's half-siblings look to cash in on a hostile takeover gambit.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Leona and Reece look to raise cash in order to salvage ACN and thwart Blair and Randy while Will gets a surprise at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. Meanwhile, Charlie trades visions with ACN suitor Lucas Pruit.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Facing a court subpoena and possible incarceration for contempt, Will stands firm in his refusal to reveal the source of the stolen DOD documents. Meanwhile, Charlie's distain for Lucas reaches a fever pitch while Sloan and Mac scramble to find a more acceptable, 11th-hour buyer for ACN.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.desc: Incarcerated for contempt, Will refuses to reveal the name of Neal's government source. Appearing to embrace Pruit's mandate to capture younger viewers, Charlie orders a reluctant Don to track down principals in a sexual abuse case at an elite college. Meanwhile, Sloan voices her objection to a new digital site built by Neal's replacement, Bree.

programme.title: The Newsroom
programme.sub-title: What Kind Of Day Has It Been
programme.desc: A colleague's death leads Will and Mac to ponder the milestones that transformed the newsroom, and to look ahead towards ACN's uncertain future. Meanwhile, Maggie lands a field producer interview in Washington while Neal's digital site is shut down for repairs.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Based on George R.R. Martin's fantasy novel, Fire and Blood, this epic series tells the story of House Targaryen and is set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council. Viserys is urged to secure the succession through marriage. Daemon announces his intentions.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon and the Sea Snake battle the Crabfeeder. The realm celebrates Aegon's second name day. Rhaenyra faces the prospect of marriage.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: After Rhaenyra cuts short her tour of Westeros, Daemon introduces the princess to the Street of Silk after dark.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale. Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Velaryons. Alicent seeks the truth about the princess.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ten years later, Rhaenyra navigates Alicent's continued speculation about her children, while Daemon and Laena weigh an offer in Pentos.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As the families gather on Driftmark for a funeral, Viserys calls for an end to infighting and Alicent demands justice.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Six years later, with the Driftmark succession suddenly critical, Rhaenyra attempts to strike a bargain with Rhaenys.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While Alicent enlists Cole and Aemond to track down Aegon, Otto gathers the great houses of Westeros to affirm their allegiance.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries to hold the realm together, and Daemon prepares for war.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries to hold the realm together, and Daemon prepares for war.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra struggles with her son's murder. Alicent grows concerned that Aegon's Small Council may lead them to war. Larys suggest Aegon needs a new Hand, and Rhaenyra arrives at a fateful decision.

programme.title: The Trouble With Jessica
programme.desc: Sarah and Tom are in deep financial trouble. Their situation takes a terrifying nosedive with the shocking behaviour of uninvited dinner guest, Jessica.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: Northern Comfort
programme.desc: A diverse group of people with a chronic fear of flying are stranded in the wintry north.

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein
programme.desc: A misunderstood teenager and a reanimated Victorian corpse embark on a murderous journey together to find love, happiness, and a few missing body parts.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: Joey (Leighton Meester) fears there could be trouble ahead after her brother Gray (Taran Killam) invites Trevor (Adam Brody), a childhood friend with a troubled past, on their white water rafting adventure with two tourists. Once they become stranded in raging rapids, the thrill-seeking trip quickly turns from exciting to utterly terrifying as the rafters are trapped in a desperate fight for their lives, all while someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure shocking secrets stay buried. To survive the wild river, Joey will have to face her fears, and everyone will have to develop killer instincts before they're torn apart by deception aboard the raft, or by deadly waters wreaking havoc all around them.

programme.title: Dracula: Voyage of the Demeter
programme.desc: Strange events befall the merchant ship Demeter, carrying private cargo - fifty unmarked wooden crates - from Carpathia to London. Stalked each night by a merciless presence onboard the ship, when the Demeter finally arrives off the shores of England, it is a charred, derelict wreck. There is no trace of the crew.

programme.title: The Innocent
programme.desc: Criminal hijinks and unexpected romance collide when the attempts of a son who, in trying to protect his mother, finds himself in an elaborate heist.

programme.title: Children Of The Corn (2020)
programme.desc: This film describes the events leading up to, and including, the massacre of the adults of a small town in Nebraska by their children.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: When their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a couple must spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorised by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called 'The Royal Hotel' in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: This film is based on the true story of a government leak from former American intelligence specialist Reality Winner. Saturday afternoon, June 2017, twenty-five-year old Reality Winner is confronted at her home by the FBI. A cryptic conversation begins and soon Reality's life starts to unravel.

programme.title: John Farnham: Finding the Voice
programme.desc: In this first authorised biopic, we follow John Farnham's life from the quiet suburbs of Melbourne to '60s pop fame, through incredible highs and lows, and ultimately to record-breaking success as 'Australia's Voice'.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: A young girl who goes through a difficult experience begins to see everyone's imaginary friends who have been left behind as their real-life friends have grown up.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures defeating world-class villains with his unmatched courage and mad martial arts skills, Po, the Dragon Warrior (Golden Globe nominee Jack Black), is called upon by destiny to give it a rest already. More specifically, he's tapped to become the Spiritual Leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: A young girl who goes through a difficult experience begins to see everyone's imaginary friends who have been left behind as their real-life friends have grown up.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family from Downunder to the States, searching for a brighter future after his successful music company collapses. With nothing more than their seven children, suitcases, and their love of music, David and his pregnant wife Helen set out to rebuild their lives. David and Helen begin to realise the musical prowess in their children, who would go on to become two of the most successful acts in Inspirational Music history.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence he has actively sat on all his life to stand up for himself, his whanau (family) and his future in this story of identity.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: As Arthur Curry confronts the responsibilities of being King of the Seven Seas, a long-buried ancient power is unleashed. After witnessing the full effect of these dark forces, Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance with an old enemy, and embark on a treacherous journey to protect his family, his kingdom, and the world from irreversible devastation.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Barry uses his superpowers to travel back in time in order to change the events of the past. But when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation, and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. That is unless Barry can coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imprisoned Kryptonian albeit not the one he's looking for. Ultimately, to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry's only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?

programme.title: The Mountain Within Me
programme.desc: After suffering a spinal cord injury, professional rugby player Ed Jackson's world changes forever. Following Ed's journey on his recovery as he achieves the heights of Snowdonia, the Alps and Himalayas.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: Joey (Leighton Meester) fears there could be trouble ahead after her brother Gray (Taran Killam) invites Trevor (Adam Brody), a childhood friend with a troubled past, on their white water rafting adventure with two tourists. Once they become stranded in raging rapids, the thrill-seeking trip quickly turns from exciting to utterly terrifying as the rafters are trapped in a desperate fight for their lives, all while someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure shocking secrets stay buried. To survive the wild river, Joey will have to face her fears, and everyone will have to develop killer instincts before they're torn apart by deception aboard the raft, or by deadly waters wreaking havoc all around them.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The world's favourite Bad Boys are back with their iconic mix of edge-of-your seat action and outrageous comedy, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: He's a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Bea and Ben's initial attraction quickly turns sour until they must pretend to be a couple.

programme.title: Master Gardener
programme.desc: A meticulous horticulturist is devoted to tending the grounds of a beautiful estate and pandering to his employer, the wealthy dowager.

programme.title: Aristotle and Dante
programme.desc: Mexican teenagers Aristotle Mendoza and Dante Quintana explore their friendship while struggling with racial and ethnic identity, sexuality and family relationships in 1987, Texas.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: A young girl who goes through a difficult experience begins to see everyone's imaginary friends who have been left behind as their real-life friends have grown up.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The Spenglers return to the New York City firehouse where the original Ghostbusters have taken ghost-busting to the next level. When the discovery of an ancient artefact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must unite to save the world.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: French Girl
programme.desc: Gordon, a high school teacher from Brooklyn, goes with his girlfriend and chef Sophie to her hometown of Quebec City, where she is testing for the Michelin 3-star restaurant of Ruby Collins.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The world's favourite Bad Boys are back with their iconic mix of edge-of-your seat action and outrageous comedy, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrate the life and music of an icon who inspired generations through his message of love, peace, and unity. In this powerful and uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's incredible story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that changed the world.

programme.title: Greatest Days
programme.desc: We follow five best friends who have the night of their lives seeing their favourite boy band in concert. Twenty-five years later their lives have changed in many different ways as they reunite for one more epic show by their beloved band, to relight their friendship and discover that maybe their greatest days are ahead of them.

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called "The Plastics". However, when Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend, she finds herself in Regina's crosshairs. She must learn to stay true to herself while navigating the most cut throat jungle of all: high school.

programme.title: High & Low - John Galliano
programme.desc: Director Kevin Macdonald examines fashion designer John Galliano's rapid ascent, fall from grace after an antisemitic tirade, and rehabilitation.

programme.title: Tenor
programme.desc: France. While working part-time as a food deliveryman, Antoine, an aspiring young rapper from the suburbs of Paris, meets Mrs Loyseau, an eminent teacher at the Paris Opera. Stunned by the young man's raw talent, she introduces him to the world of opera. As Antoine becomes one of Mrs Loyseau's students, he hides his new dream from his friends and family, fearing that they won't understand. Somewhere in between the gilded and uptight Parisian upper-class, and the harsh yet free-spirited and familiar suburbs he grew up in, Antoine will have to find his own voice.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
programme.desc: A naval officer stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he feels is acting in an unstable way, putting in danger both the ship and its crew.

programme.title: The Big Dog
programme.desc: When his secret dominatrix cleans out all of his bank accounts, a married stockbroker has one day to save his life from ruin.

programme.title: Mercy Road
programme.desc: A flawed man commits a crime and learns how far he is willing to go to save his child.

programme.title: The Innocent
programme.desc: Criminal hijinks and unexpected romance collide when the attempts of a son who, in trying to protect his mother, finds himself in an elaborate heist.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance gripped the nation, a married couple buckles under pressure when an actress arrives to do research for a film about their past.

programme.title: The Last Rifleman
programme.desc: World War II veteran Artie Crawford lives in Northern Ireland. After his wife's death, he decides to set off alone to France to attend the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Set during the tense 19 days of the Yom Kippur War in 1973. Israeli Prime Minister Golda Meir is faced with the potential of Israel's complete destruction, and must navigate overwhelming odds, a skeptical cabinet, and a complex relationship with US Secretary of State Henry Kissinger. Her tough leadership and compassion would ultimately decide the fate of her nation and leave her with a controversial legacy around the world.

programme.title: Rock Hudson: All The Heaven Allowed
programme.desc: The biography of renowned actor Rock Hudson is examined in this relevant investigation of Hollywood and LGBTQ+ identity, from his public 'ladies' man' character to his private life as a gay man.

programme.title: The Color Purple (2023)
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband simply called Mister. With the support of sultry singer Shug Avery and stand-her-ground stepdaughter Sofia, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: John Farnham: Finding the Voice
programme.desc: In this first authorised biopic, we follow John Farnham's life from the quiet suburbs of Melbourne to '60s pop fame, through incredible highs and lows, and ultimately to record-breaking success as 'Australia's Voice'.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family from Downunder to the States, searching for a brighter future after his successful music company collapses. With nothing more than their seven children, suitcases, and their love of music, David and his pregnant wife Helen set out to rebuild their lives. David and Helen begin to realise the musical prowess in their children, who would go on to become two of the most successful acts in Inspirational Music history.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: Freud invites iconic author C.S. Lewis to debate the existence of God, his unique relationship with his daughter, and Lewis' unconventional relationship with his best friend's mother.

programme.title: Bank of Dave
programme.desc: Based on the true-life experiences of Dave Fishwick, Bank of Dave tells the story of how a working-class Burnley man and self-made millionaire fought to set up a community bank.

programme.title: Cat Person
programme.desc: When Margot, a college sophomore, goes on a date with the older Robert, she finds that IRL Robert doesn't live up to the Robert she has been flirting with over texts.

programme.title: Biosphere
programme.desc: In the not-too-distant future, the last two men on earth must adapt and evolve to save humanity.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: Whale Nation
programme.desc: A humpback whale is beached on a remote shore. During the fight to save its life, we will discover the story of these extraordinary creatures, denizens of the world's oceans. Inspired by the best-selling book, and exquisitely narrated by Richard E. Grant, Whale Nation takes us on a journey of discovery into the unexplored territories and barely known society of whales, with their remarkable abilities and incredibly rich and complex social lives. A film about life in all its diversity, about human's place on Earth and the vital need for cooperation between the species that share our planet.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: A Mexican-American college grad's life is turned upside down when a mysterious scarab gives him the ability to generate an exoskeleton suit of incredible power.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: A young girl who goes through a difficult experience begins to see everyone's imaginary friends who have been left behind as their real-life friends have grown up.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: He's a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is perfectly content fading into the background. But when his co-worker Benson goes on a sudden and violent rampage leaving a trail of destruction in his wake, Randy is forced to face his fears and confront his troubled past in order to survive.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: Joey (Leighton Meester) fears there could be trouble ahead after her brother Gray (Taran Killam) invites Trevor (Adam Brody), a childhood friend with a troubled past, on their white water rafting adventure with two tourists. To survive the wild river, Joey will have to face her fears, and everyone will have to develop killer instincts before they're torn apart by deception aboard the raft, or by deadly waters wreaking havoc all around them.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: The Ritual Killer
programme.desc: A detective on the verge of retirement teams with a professor of African Studies to track down a serial killer who performs an ancient ritual on his victims.

programme.title: Five Nights At Freddy's
programme.desc: After accepting a security guard job from Steve, Mike discovers an abandoned restaurant may be haunted by murderous animatronics.

programme.title: Immaculate
programme.desc: Cecilia, a woman of devout faith, is warmly welcomed to the picture-perfect Italian countryside where she is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But it becomes clear to Cecilia that her new home harbors dark and horrifying secrets.

programme.title: Night Swim
programme.desc: Former baseball player Ray Waller moves into a new home with his family. But a dark secret in the home's past will unleash a malevolent force that will drag the family into the depths of terror.

programme.title: The Exorcist: Believer
programme.desc: When a 12-year-old girl becomes possessed by a mysterious demonic entity, her father desperately searches for help.

programme.title: Children Of The Corn (2020)
programme.desc: This film describes the events leading up to, and including, the massacre of the adults of a small town in Nebraska by their children.

She must learn to stay true to herself while navigating the most cut throat jungle of all: high school.

programme.title: YOLO
programme.desc: China. After an argument with her younger sister, Le Ying moves out on her own. She meets a boxing trainer and starts boxing.

programme.title: Blackberry
programme.desc: Showcases the true story of the meteoric rise and catastrophic demise of the world's first smartphone, through a ruthlessly competitive Silicon Valley.

programme.desc: After showing signs of clairvoyance, New York City paramedic Cassandra Webb must confront revelations about her past and protect three young women from a mysterious adversary who wants them dead.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: November
programme.desc: France. 5 days into the heart of the French anti-terrorism services hunt for suspects after the 13/11/2015 attacks in Paris. An edge-of-your-seat deep-dive into one of the most incredible manhunts in European history.

programme.title: Lights Out
programme.desc: A homeless veteran gets caught up in the world of underground fight clubs.

programme.title: You'll Never Find Me
programme.desc: An isolated man living at the back of a desolate caravan park is visited by a desperate young woman seeking shelter from a violent storm. As the savage storm worsens, these solitary souls begin to feel threatened, but who should really be afraid?

programme.title: Unseen
programme.desc: Sam receives a call from Emily regarding a nearly blind woman who is running from her murderous ex in the woods. She must survive the ordeal with Sam being her eyes using video calls.

programme.title: Tarot
programme.desc: When a group of friends recklessly violates the sacred rule of Tarot readings, they unknowingly unleash an unspeakable evil trapped within the cursed cards. One by one, they come face to face with fate and end up in a race against death.

programme.title: Drive-Away Dolls
programme.desc: Free-spirited Jamie and her demure friend, Marian, embark on a road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start, but things go wrong when they meet inept criminals along the way.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed deep beneath the desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened in our current day. Her malevolence has grown over millennia and with it come terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Defence lawyers Daniel Kaffee and Joanne Galloway are assigned the case of defending two US soldiers, accused of murdering a fellow soldier who was deemed to have 'broken the code'. Kaffee and Galloway soon run into a brick wall with Col Nathan Jessep, who sees himself as a military 'untouchable'. The accused claim they were obeying orders, and that the death was an accident.

programme.title: Rock of Ages
programme.desc: The story of small town girl Sherrie and city boy Drew, who meet on the Sunset Strip while pursuing their Hollywood dreams. Their rock 'n' roll romance is told through the heart-pounding hits of Def Leppard, Joan Jett, Journey, Foreigner, Bon Jovi, and more.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: This spectacular adventure pits Godzilla, the world's famous monster, against malevolent creatures that, bolstered by humanity's scientific arrogance, threaten our very existence.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: When a scientific expedition to an uncharted island awakens titanic forces of nature, a mission of discovery becomes an explosive war between monster and man.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: An epic action adventure that pits Godzilla against some of the most popular monsters in pop culture history. The new story follows the heroic efforts of the crypto-zoological agency Monarch as its members face off against a battery of god-sized monsters, including the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis, the three-headed King Ghidorah. When these ancient super-species thought to be mere myths rise again, they all vie for supremacy, leaving humanity's very existence hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Legends collide as Godzilla and Kong, the two most powerful forces of nature, clash on the big screen in a spectacular battle for the ages. As a squadron embarks on a perilous mission into fantastic uncharted terrain, unearthing clues to the Titans' very origins and mankind's survival, a conspiracy threatens to wipe the creatures, both good and bad, from the face of the earth forever.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Godzilla

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: When a scientific expedition to an uncharted island awakens titanic forces of nature, a mission of discovery becomes an explosive war between monster and man.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: This spectacular adventure pits Godzilla, the world's famous monster, against malevolent creatures that, bolstered by humanity's scientific arrogance, threaten our very existence.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: Men in Black follows the exploits of Agents Kay and Jay, members of a top-secret organization established to monitor alien activity on Earth. The two MIB find themselves in the middle of a deadly plot by an intergalactic terrorist, who has arrived on Earth to assassinate two ambassadors from opposing galaxies. Kay and Jay face a simple imperative: track down the interloper or Earth will be destroyed. It's all in a day's work for the Men in Black.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: When a renegade Kylothian monster disguised as a lingerie model threatens the survival of the human race, the boys of the MIB get the call to step up and get busy. With their headquarters under siege and time running out, Agents K and J enlist the help of Frank the Pug and a posse of hard-living worms to help them kick some seriously sexy alien butt!

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agents J and K are back in time. J has seen some inexplicable things in his 15 years with the Men in Black, but nothing, not even aliens, perplexes him as much as his wry, reticent partner. But when K's life and the fate of the planet are put at stake, Agent J will have to travel back in time to put things right. J discovers that there are secrets to the universe that K never told him, secrets that will reveal themselves as he teams up with the young Agent K to save his partner, the agency and the future of humankind.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: While visiting the Earth at Night, a group of alien botanists is discovered and disturbed by an approaching human task force. Because of the more than hasty take-off, one of the visitors is left behind. The little alien finds himself all alone on a very strange planet. Fortunately, the extra-terrestrial soon finds a friend and emotional companion in 10-year-old Elliot, who discovered him looking for food in his family's garden shed. While E.T. slowly gets acquainted with Elliot's brother Michael, his sister Gertie as well as with Earth customs, members of the task force work day and night to track down the whereabouts of Earth's first visitor from Outer Space.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Stanely Ipkiss is a mild mannered bank clerk who discovers a mysterious ancient mask which brings his inner most desires screaming to life. Now, together with his sidekick dog, Milo, this wise cracking, love-crazy, crime-fighting green tornado is taking Edge City by storm, in an unstoppable action comedy that will leave you smokin'!

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: As Arthur Curry confronts the responsibilities of being King of the Seven Seas, a long-buried ancient power is unleashed. After witnessing the full effect of these dark forces, Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance with an old enemy, and embark on a treacherous journey to protect his family, his kingdom, and the world from irreversible devastation.

The epic graphic novel by Frank Miller assaults the screen with the blood, thunder and awe of its ferocious visual style faithfully recreated in an intense film. Retelling the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, it depicts the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought to the death against Xerxes and his massive Persian army.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: With our time on Earth coming to an end, a team of explorers undertakes the most important mission in human history: travelling beyond this galaxy to discover whether mankind has a future among the stars.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: When the crew of the Enterprise is called back home, they find an unstoppable force of terror from within their own organisation has detonated the fleet and everything it stands for, leaving our world in a state of crisis. With a personal score to settle, Captain Kirk leads a manhunt to a war zone world to capture a one man weapon of mass destruction. As our heroes are propelled into an epic chess game of life and death, love will be challenged, friendships will be torn apart, and sacrifices must be made for the only family Kirk has left: his crew.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: On the turbo-charged streets of Los Angeles, every night is a championship race. With nitro-boosted fury, Dominic Toretto rules the road, turning all his challengers into dust. He and his rival, Johnny Tran, are the boldest, the baddest, and the best, but now there's new rage on the road. They know he's tough, they know he's fast, but what they don't know is that he's a speed demon detective with enough drive and determination to come out the winner.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: It's the nitro-fuelled answer to the question: how fast do you like it? Now an ex-cop on the run, Brian O'Connor hooks into outlaw street-racing. When the Feds strong-arm him back, O'Connor's no rules, win-or-die skills are unleashed against an international drug lord. With his velocity-addicted buddy riding shotgun, and a drop-dead-gorgeous undercover agent dialling up the heat, this film accelerates the action into a desperate race for survival, justice and mind-blowing, jaw-dropping speed.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch," based on Dr. Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Young Alan Parrish sits down as a young boy to play a game with his friend, Sarah, and on a roll of the dice is mysteriously transported into the strange jungle realm of Jumanji. There he remains trapped for 26 years, until two newly orphaned children, Judy and Peter, playing in the attic of Alan's childhood home, free the now-adult Alan from the game's clutches. But to defeat Jumanji's encroaching powers, the three reluctant players must find the now-grown Sarah and band together as a makeshift family to finish the game - before it finishes them.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Sophie has just one wish to make her wedding perfect: to have her father walk her down the aisle. Now she just has to find out who he is. Join the music, laughter and fun of the irresistibly charming musical celebration of mothers, daughters and fathers, and true loves lost and new ones found. Based on the Broadway smash-hit and filled with the ABBA songs you know and love, it's the feel-good experience that will have you singing and dancing over and over again.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Greek general Themistokles of Athens leads the naval charge against invading Persian forces led by mortal-turned-god Xerxes and Artemisia, vengeful commander of the Persian navy.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Barry uses his superpowers to travel back in time in order to change the events of the past. But when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation, and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. That is unless Barry can coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imprisoned Kryptonian albeit not the one he's looking for. Ultimately, to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry's only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?

programme.title: Batman (1989)
programme.desc: After witnessing the brutal murder of his parents as a child, millionaire philanthropist Bruce Wayne pledges his life to fighting crime disguised as Batman. His long-time nemesis, The Joker, has sinister plans for the citizens of Gotham City. The Joker's greed is matched by his obsession with photojournalist Vicki Vale. Batman is there to counter the Joker's every move. With the fate of Gotham and Vicki in the balance, will good or evil prevail?

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When convicted street racer Sean Boswell tries to start a new life on the other side of the world, his obsession with racing sets him on a collision course with the Japanese underworld. To survive, he will have to master drifting - a new style of racing where tricked-out cars slide through hairpin turns, defying gravity and death for the ultimate road rush.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: This high-octane action-thriller sees two men go back to the streets where it all began as they blast their way across Los Angeles and through the Mexican desert.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Once upon a Christmas Eve, an orphan baby crawled into Santa's bag of gifts and was taken to the North Pole. Raised by Papa Elf, Buddy comes to realise he doesn't fit in with the other elves. Determined to find a place where he belongs, Buddy searches for his real dad in New York City. In the Big Apple, Buddy finds out why his dad is on the naughty list. But most importantly, he sees that the world is seriously lacking in Christmas spirit, which causes Santa all kinds of problems. So with the help of a beautiful department store elf, Buddy tries to teach his dad and the world the true meaning of Christmas spirit and to prove to everyone that Santa really exists.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Alex the lion is the king of the urban jungle, the main attraction at New York's Central Park Zoo. He and his best friends, Marty the zebra, Melman the giraffe and Gloria the hippo have spent their whole lives in blissful captivity before an admiring public and with regular meals provided for them. Not content to leave well enough alone, Marty lets his curiosity get the better of him and makes his escape with the help of some prodigious penguins to explore the world.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: Dora Saves the Mermaids
programme.desc: Dora and Boots need your help to save Mermaid Kingdom from a mean, garbage-dumping Octopus by bringing a magical mermaid crown back to Mariana the Mermaid. But how will Dora get to Mermaid Kingdom?

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: Horace Nebbercracker is the meanest man in town, heaven forbid anything that lands on his lawn or he'll snatch it away forever. DJ's obsession with spying on the creepy house across the street has made him a bit of an outcast, but he's determined to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: Tom Lee discovers he is part of a long lineage of magical protectors known as the Guardians. With guidance from a mythical tiger named Hu, Tom trains to take on an evil force that threatens humanity.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure in the all-star adventure, The Road to El Dorado! Upon landing on the shores of El Dorado, the legendary Lost City of Gold, Tulio and Miguel are mistaken for gods and are lavished with riches beyond their wildest dreams! As friendship, loyalty, and greed collide, our unlikely heroes must make the decision of their lives: run off with the gold or face unforeseen dangers to save the people of El Dorado.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: The Cat in the Hat who goes by that name is played by Mike Myers of comedy fame! It starts with two kids on a cold, cold wet day their mum is at work and they've no games to play! Then in walks the fun in the form of a Cat who pulls out the laughs from the brim of his hat. Things really get wild when the Cat and his crew (who go by the name of Thing One and Thing Two) take over the house of Conrad and Sally in this fine family film that's right up your alley!

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure Daddy Day Camp secures its rightful place in kid camp history.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween follows the Quinn family - high school senior Sarah, her middle school brother Sony, and their mother Kathy into an entirely new set of spooky, exciting, and funny events. Sonny and schoolmate Sam are best friends with a side job as the "Junk Brothers," collecting discarded stuff other people don't want. But it's a gig that unfortunately leads them right into the path of (gulp) Slappy, the mischievous ventriloquist dummy from an unpublished Goosebumps book.

programme.title: Inspector Sun
programme.desc: Fired from his detective job after a mission goes awry, Inspector Sun boards a seemingly normal plane for a much-needed vacation. However, when Dr. Spindlethorp receives a threat on his life, Sun is back on the case, trapped in a web of lies.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: This family drama follows Chrissa Maxwell, who moves with her parents to snowy Minnesota, where she has to start at a new school mid-year, but is worried she won't fit in and will have trouble making new friends. On her very first day, Chrissa is seated with three girls who greet her with teasing and tricks. The 'Mean Bees' bully Chrissa and the other kids in class, on the bus, online, and even at swim club. Chrissa can't seem to make any new friends, not even with the girl who seems to need a friend the most. When the biggest bully becomes Chrissa's swimming rival, the taunting finally goes too far. Can Chrissa find a way to stand strong and stop the bullying?

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, his adorable girls, and the mischievous Minions are back with a cast of unforgettable new characters in the blockbuster sequel to the worldwide phenomenon. Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world. Partnered with secret agent Lucy Wilde, Gru, along with the wildly unpredictable Minions, must figure out how to keep his cover while also keeping up with his duties as a father. Get ready for more Minion madness.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel creates a couple of mischievous Smurf-like creatures called the Naughties hoping they will let him harness the magical Smurf-essence. However, he soon discovers that he needs the help of Smurfette, who knows the secret to turning the Naughties into real Smurfs. When Gargamel and his Naughties kidnap Smurfette from Smurf Village and bring her to Paris, it's up to Papa, Clumsy, Grouchy and Vanity to reunite with their human friends, Patrick and Grace Winslow, and rescue her!

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Starting as single-celled yellow organisms, Minions evolve through the ages, perpetually serving the most despicable of masters. Continuously unsuccessful at keeping these masters, from T-rex to Napoleon, the Minions find themselves without someone to serve and fall into a deep depression. One Minion named Kevin has a plan, and he, alongside teenage rebel Stuart and lovable little Bob, ventures out into the world to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. The trio embarks upon a thrilling journey that ultimately leads them to their next potential master, Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever female supervillain. They travel from frigid Antarctica to 1960s New York City, ending in mod London, where they must face their biggest challenge to-date: saving all of Minionkind from annihilation.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog. But when Sherman takes the WABAC out for a joyride to impress his friend Penny, they accidentally rip a hole in the universe, wreaking havoc on the most important events in world history. Before they forever alter the past, present and future, Mr. Peabody must come to their rescue, ultimately facing the most daunting challenge of any era: figuring out how to be a parent. Together, the time traveling trio will make their mark on history.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the world's first family road trip. When their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home. As if patriarch Grug didn't already have enough to handle, it goes from bad to worse when they encounter an imaginative nomad named Guy. With Guy's help the Croods conquer their fear of the outside world and discover that they have exactly what it takes to survive - each other.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Cybertron has fallen. When Optimus Prime sends Bumblebee to protect Earth, he begins his journey to become the hero the Universe needs. Crash landing, with no memory of his past, Bumblebee takes refuge in a junkyard disguised as a VW Beetle. Charlie (Hailee Steinfeld), a teenager trying to find her place in the world, discovers and repairs the battle-scarred robot. When the Decepticons forge an alliance with a secret agency led by Agent Burns (John Cena) to hunt down the remaining Autobots, Bumblebee and Charlie team up to protect the world in an action-packed adventure filled with humour and heart that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin: The Secret of the Unicorn
programme.desc: In this beloved tale, Tintin and Snowy travel the world outwitting their enemies to find the resting place of The Unicorn, a shipwreck that holds the key to a vast fortune and an ancient curse.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: Rango is an ordinary chameleon who accidentally winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in desperate need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures defeating world-class villains with his unmatched courage and mad martial arts skills, Po, the Dragon Warrior (Golden Globe nominee Jack Black), is called upon by destiny to give it a rest already. More specifically, he's tapped to become the Spiritual Leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: The Secret of the Sword
programme.desc: Prince Adam is sent to the world of Etheria to find his long abducted sister, Adora, and awaken her to her own destiny.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey 2
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Tad And The Secret Of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad dreams of becoming an archaeologist traveling the world, uncovering hidden secrets and lost treasure, but his job working construction keeps him daydreaming instead of exploring. The chance of a lifetime comes when he is invited to attend archaeologist Sara Loavrof's presentation of her latest discovery, the papyrus that proves the existence of the Necklace of Midas, the legendary King who turned everything he touched into solid gold. When an evil billionaire forces Sara to help him find the enchanted talisman, Tad must rescue the girl of his dreams on a trip around the world, in this new hilarious, action-packed adventure the whole family will love!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups
programme.desc: When their latest scheme goes awry, Mayor Humdinger and his nephew Harold accidentally divert a meteor towards Adventure Bay. The meteor's golden energy grants the PAW Patrol superpowers! The heroic MIGHTY PUPS are on a roll to super-save the day!

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: Dive into the undersea sensation! After King Neptune's crown is stolen and Mr Krabs is accused of the crime, SpongeBob and Patrick set out on a danger-ridden, hilarity-filled adventure to retrieve the crown and save Mr Krabs.

programme.title: The Pirates! Band of Misfits
programme.desc: Set sail for a fun-filled voyage and hilarious pirate antics with the biggest band of misfits on the seven seas. When the infamous Pirate Captain is shunned once again by his rivals Black Bellamy and Cutlass Liz, he sets his sights to win the coveted Pirate of the Year Award. With his trusted dodo, Polly, and ragtag crew at his side, the Pirate Captain will need to battle a diabolical queen, save a young scientist and never lose sight of what a pirate loves best: adventure.

programme.title: Dora's Royal Rescue
programme.desc: In 'Dora's Royal Rescue,' Dora's a knight and Boots is her squire as they help the noble horse Rocinante, rescue Don Quixote who is imprisoned by Malambruno, an evil wizard, in an abandoned library inside Story Castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into the middle of Central Park, but they must find a way back before he tracks them down.

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: The world of Pokemon comes to life! The story begins when ace detective Harry Goodman goes mysteriously missing, prompting his 21-year-old son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding in the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu: a hilariously wise-cracking, adorable super-sleuth who is a puzzlement even to himself. Finding that they are uniquely equipped to communicate with one another, Tim and Pikachu join forces on a thrilling adventure to unravel the tangled mystery. Chasing clues together through the neon-lit streets of Ryme City - a sprawling, modern metropolis where humans and Pokemon live side by side in a hyper-realistic live-action world - they encounter a diverse cast of Pokemon characters and uncover a shocking plot that could destroy this peaceful co-existence and threaten the whole Pokemon universe.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Brooklyn teen Miles Morales is introduced to the limitless possibilities of the Spider-Verse, where more than one can wear the mask.

programme.title: TMNT: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. They take on a crime syndicate, but soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: A projectionist allows 11-year-old boy Danny to a private midnight preview of the latest movie featuring his idol and superhero, Jack Slater.
