A magic ticket transports the boy into the film, where he helps his hero chase the baddie, who in turn breaks through the screen to wreak havoc in real-life, with the help of an evil sidekick.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A wonderful little girl who happens to be a genius, along with her understanding teacher, outwit the worst parents and the worst school principal imaginable.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist - a place of strange life forms, mountains of gold, deadly volcanoes, and more than one astonishing secret. Unable to stop him from going, Sean's new stepfather joins the quest. Together with a helicopter pilot and his beautiful, strong-willed daughter, they set out to find the island, rescue its lone inhabitant and escape before seismic shock waves force the island under the sea and bury its treasures forever.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Clumsy and overweight panda, Po, dreams of becoming a kung fu master.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette, and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty, on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest, filled with magical creatures, to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does. Embarking on a roller-coaster journey full of action and danger, the Smurfs are on a course that leads to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

programme.title: The Croods
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the world's first family road trip. When their cave is destroyed, the Crood family must embark on a comedy adventure into strange and spectacular territory in search of a new home. As if patriarch Grug didn't already have enough to handle, it goes from bad to worse when they encounter an imaginative nomad named Guy. With Guy's help the Croods conquer their fear of the outside world and discover that they have exactly what it takes to survive - each other.

programme.title: The Croods: A New Age
programme.desc: In search of a new home, the Croods encounter the more sophisticated Betterman family. A new threat forces the two families to set aside their differences to avoid extinction.

programme.title: Dora's World Adventure
programme.desc: Everyone's celebrating Friendship Day! But when Swiper mistakenly swipes all the special glowing Friendship Bracelets, Dora needs to team up with him to bring them back to the Friendship Parades.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure Daddy Day Camp secures its rightful place in kid camp history.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
programme.desc: The hood and The Man go head-to-head in this big screen version of the hit cartoon series. Arnold and his multi-ethnic gang must save their neighbourhood from the bulldozers in this refreshingly nuanced charmer featuring the voices of Jennifer Jason Leigh and Christopher Lloyd, among others.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: PAW PATROL: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: A meteor crash gives the PAW Patrol pups superpowers, transforming them into the Mighty Pups. But things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger breaks out of jail to steal their superpowers.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Alex the lion is the king of the urban jungle, the main attraction at New York's Central Park Zoo. He and his best friends, Marty the zebra, Melman the giraffe and Gloria the hippo have spent their whole lives in blissful captivity before an admiring public and with regular meals provided for them. Not content to leave well enough alone, Marty lets his curiosity get the better of him and makes his escape with the help of some prodigious penguins to explore the world.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Morty and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: Dive into adventure in the sun-drenched Florida Keys with this action-packed family favourite. When Sandy Ricks is sent to Coral Key to stay with his salty Uncle Porter for the summer, he never dreamed he would become best mates with a feisty, orphaned dolphin named Flipper. In no time, the two new friends become caught up in a series of high-seas escapades and Sandy discovers a whole new outlook on life in this heart-warming adventure.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Adventuring out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. When his family risks everything to come find him, he must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: Recruited from youngsters into the global spy game, four penguins are called into action by a mysterious espionage organisation in order to save the world from a villainous octopus.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives. Welcome to the most astonishing chapter of one of the most beloved animated franchises in film history: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World. Now chief and ruler of Berk alongside Astrid, Hiccup has created a gloriously chaotic dragon utopia. When the sudden appearance of a female Light Fury coincides with the darkest threat their village has ever faced, Hiccup and Toothless must leave the only home they've known and journey to a hidden world thought only to exist in myth. As their true destines are revealed, dragon and rider will fight together - to the very ends of the Earth - to protect everything they've grown to treasure.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: Pubert, the Addams' new baby, is in danger of being sabotaged by Wednesday and Puggsley, until Morticia and Gomez hire a nanny, Debbie, who marries Fester and tries to murder him for his money.

programme.title: Spirit Untamed
programme.desc: The next chapter in this beloved franchise begins as a young girl finds a connection to her mother's legacy as a trick rider and forms a bond with a wild mustang named Spirit.

programme.title: Curious George: Go West, Go Wild
programme.desc: Follows George and Ted as they travel to cousin Ginny's farm for a relaxing outdoor weekend, but plans take a turn when her farm animals escape.

programme.title: Dora Saves the Crystal Kingdom
programme.desc: A greedy king has stolen the colour from the Crystal Kingdom and it's up to Dora, Boots and their new friend Allie to save the day.

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie
programme.desc: Hang on to your diapers! The Rugrats babies, intrepid explorers and stars of the wildly-popular animated series, are off on their first feature-length adventure. With the birth of his new baby brother Dylan, Tommy Pickles knew things were about to change, but he never expected that being a big brother could be such an adventure. While attempting to return Dil to 'hopsical', the Rugrats commandeer the Reptar Wagon and inadvertently get lost in the forest. It's a rollicking, musical ride into a world beyond their backyard as the Rugrats encounter obstacles and some big surprises in their quest to get back home.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: Taking place in a Manhattan apartment building, Max's life as a favourite pet is turned upside down, when his owner brings home a sloppy mongrel named Duke. They have to put their quarrels behind when they find out that an adorable white bunny named Snowball is building an army of lost pets determined to take revenge.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy suburban neighbourhood surrounded by white picket fences and flowering rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. Unbeknownst to the neighbours, hidden deep beneath this home is a vast secret hideout belonging to Gru, a dastardly villain who, along with the help of his many little minions, is planning the biggest heist in the history of the world: he's going to steal the moon!

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween follows the Quinn family - high school senior Sarah, her middle school brother Sony, and their mother Kathy into an entirely new set of spooky, exciting, and funny events. Sonny and schoolmate Sam are best friends with a side job as the "Junk Brothers," collecting discarded stuff other people don't want. But it's a gig that unfortunately leads them right into the path of (gulp) Slappy, the mischievous ventriloquist dummy from an unpublished Goosebumps book.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: St Trinian's
programme.desc: The hilarious antics and girl-power action return as the 'young ladies' of the infamous school St Trinian's face its closure once more as dire financial problems set in. Headmistress Camilla Fritton is threatened, not only by the bank but her unorthodox doctrine of free expression and self-empowerment has drawn the attention of education minister Geoffrey Thwaites. Even though he's an old flame of Camilla's, right now he's determined to bring discipline and order to the anarchic school. However those smart and fearless St Trinian's girls are determined to defend the school they love to the end.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: For the first time, SpongeBob SquarePants, the world's favourite sea-dwelling invertebrate, comes ashore to our world for his most super-heroic adventure yet. Life in Bikini Bottom couldn't be better for eternal optimist SpongeBob and his friends: loyal starfish Patrick, the sardonic Squidward, scientist squirrel Sandy and crustacean capitalist, Mr. Krabs When the top secret recipe for Krabby Patties is stolen, eternal adversaries SpongeBob and Plankton must join forces on a trip through time and space to harness their internal superpowers and battle fiendish pirate Burger with his own plans for the delicious delicacies.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: An egg emergency ensues when the rock 'n' roll-loving teen son of the Easter Bunny shirks his responsibility and runs away from home.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: The heartwarming adventure of Bella, a dog who embarks on an epic 644km journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Jet To The Rescue
programme.desc: When the scheming Duke of Flappington steals a powerful levitation gem from the royal castle and uses its magical powers to raise Barkingburg into the clouds, Skye will need to overcome her fears and lead the team in their biggest aerial rescue yet!

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: Dora's Enchanted Forest Adventures
programme.desc: Explore the Enchanted Forest with Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio in this trilogy of magical adventures, concluding in an enchanted double-length episode.

programme.title: The Land Before Time
programme.desc: Join Littlefoot, Cera, Spike, Ducky and Petrie on their first journey together to find the lush, legendary Great Valley. Along the way, the prehistoric pals overcome many challenges and learn the value of teamwork and friendship.

programme.title: Paw Patrol: Ready, Race, Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the Adventure Bay 500! The pups are ready to be the pit crew for their race hero, The Whoosh. When the legendary racer is unable to drive, he calls on Marshall to take the wheel.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Under The Boardwalk
programme.desc: When timid Jersey crab Armen meets bold tourist sea crab Ramona, it causes tension in the community. But when the duo are swept away by a storm, they embark on an epic journey to find home.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: The Secret of the Sword
programme.desc: Prince Adam is sent to the world of Etheria to find his long abducted sister, Adora, and awaken her to her own destiny.

programme.title: Adventures in Zambezia
programme.desc: When a young falcon named Kai learns of the famed bird city of Zambezia, he journeys there against his father's wishes. But when his dad is captured, Kai must rescue his father and new friends.

programme.title: TMNT: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. They take on a crime syndicate, but soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart, the Little family's lonely mouse 'son', gets into strife by befriending a canary.

programme.title: Stuart Little 3: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: School's out for the summer, and the Little family is spending their vacation at a beautiful lakeside cabin. Stuart can't wait to spend his entire vacation canoeing, hiking and finding his inner scout.

programme.title: The Swan Princess: A Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Join Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their royal friends as they set sail for another magical adventure in the enchanted land of Cathay.

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: Tom Lee discovers he is part of a long lineage of magical protectors known as the Guardians. With guidance from a mythical tiger named Hu, Tom trains to take on an evil force that threatens humanity.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sets Smurfette, and her best friends Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty, on an exciting and thrilling race through the Forbidden Forest, filled with magical creatures, to find a mysterious lost village before the evil wizard Gargamel does. Embarking on a roller-coaster journey full of action and danger, the Smurfs are on a course that leads to the discovery of the biggest secret in Smurf history.

programme.title: Rugrats Go Wild!
programme.desc: The Rugrats family vacation takes an exotic detour when their boat capsizes and they become marooned on a deserted tropical island. With the jungle as their new backyard, the babies race from one wild adventure to the next, soon to discover that someone else is on the island. It's The Wild Thornberries on an adventure of their own. When these two families get together, the excitement really starts!

programme.title: Open Season
programme.desc: A clueless domesticated bear and an outcast deer try to survive trigger-happy hunters and hostile forest critters.

programme.title: Migration
programme.desc: The Mallard family embark on a journey south for the winter to Jamaica via New York City, only for their well-laid plans to go awry, leading to new friends and unknown horizons.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: The classic story of loyalty, trust and sacrifice comes to life in this live-action adaptation. Wilbur is a terrific and radiant pig. Once Wilbur moves into a new barn, he begins a friendship with the most unlikely of creatures - a spider named Charlotte - and their bond inspires the animals to come together as a family. When the word gets out that Wilbur's days are numbered, it seems that only a miracle will save his life. A determined Charlotte - who sees miracles in the ordinary - spins words into her web in an effort to convince the farmer that Wilbur is 'some pig' and worth saving.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures defeating world-class villains with his unmatched courage and mad martial arts skills, Po, the Dragon Warrior (Golden Globe nominee Jack Black), is called upon by destiny to give it a rest already. More specifically, he's tapped to become the Spiritual Leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Trolls World Tour
programme.desc: Poppy and Branch discover that there are six different troll tribes scattered over six different lands. Each tribe is also devoted to six different kinds of music - funk, country, techno, classical, pop and rock. When rockers Queen Barb and King Thrash set out to destroy the other music, Poppy and Branch embark on a daring mission to unite the trolls and save the diverse melodies from becoming extinct.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: Dive into adventure in the sun-drenched Florida Keys with this action-packed family favourite. When Sandy Ricks is sent to Coral Key to stay with his salty Uncle Porter for the summer, he never dreamed he would become best mates with a feisty, orphaned dolphin named Flipper. In no time, the two new friends become caught up in a series of high-seas escapades and Sandy discovers a whole new outlook on life in this heart-warming adventure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the evil wizard Gargamel chases the tiny blue Smurfs out of their village, they tumble from their magical world into the middle of Central Park, but they must find a way back before he tracks them down.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, particularly all the money spent and alone for the holiday for the first time in decades, as their daughter has just joined the Peace Corps, grumpy Luther Krank and his sweet wife, Nora, decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations, the cards, the parties and to spend the dollars saved on a 10-day Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Ruby Gillman, Teenage Kraken
programme.desc: High school gets even more awkward when shy teen Ruby Gillman learns that she comes from a royal family of sea krakens and that her destiny is bigger than she ever imagined.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist - a place of strange life forms, mountains of gold, deadly volcanoes, and more than one astonishing secret. Unable to stop him from going, Sean's new stepfather joins the quest. Together with a helicopter pilot and his beautiful, strong-willed daughter, they set out to find the island, rescue its lone inhabitant and escape before seismic shock waves force the island under the sea and bury its treasures forever.

programme.title: Dora's Birthday Adventure
programme.desc: Dora and Boots need to get home for Dora's birthday party. But before they can jump out of the Magic Storybook, a wind blows them into Wizzle World. Here, they need to take the crystal to the Wishing Wizzle on Wizzle Mountain, so he can wish them home!

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie
programme.desc: Hold on to your berets, the Rugrats kids are headed for Paris. France doesn't stand a chance. When Stu Pickles is summoned to work at EuroReptarland, Paris's newest amusement park, the Rugrats kids tag along. From the Eiffel Tower to Notre Dame, no attraction is safe from the Rugrats who find that fun is the same in any language. Meanwhile, love is in the air for Chuckie's dad, Chas. Could Chuckie be getting a new mum? The Rugrats learn valuable lessons in courage, loyalty and true love in this music-filled journey.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is coping with some major life changes. His owner is now married and has a toddler, Liam. Max is so worried about protecting the boy that he develops a nervous tic. On a family trip to a farm, Max and mutt Duke encounter canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a terrifying turkey, all of which only elevates Max's anxiety. Luckily, Max gets some guidance from veteran farm dog Rooster, who pushes Max to ditch his neuroses, find his inner alpha and give Liam a little more freedom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Retired super-assassin John Wick returns with a $14 million price tag on his head and an army of bounty-hunting killers on his trail. The killing of a member of the shadowy international assassins guild known as the High Table leaves John Wick excommunicado. In a lethal world of blood oaths and ever-changing alliances, John is dogged by the most ruthless hitmen and women in the world. Could this be John Wick's last stand?

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: When an unknown caller puts a bomb in Matt Turner's car, he must complete a series of tasks. With his kids trapped in the back seat, he races to save his family.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: This film is an epic action fantasy that takes us into the vivid imagination of a young girl whose dream world provides the ultimate escape from her darker reality. Unrestrained by the boundaries of time and place, she is free to go where her mind takes her, and her incredible adventures blur the lines between what's real and what is imaginary. She has been locked away against her will, but Babydoll has not lost her will to survive. Determined to fight for her freedom, she urges four other young girls - the reluctant Sweet Pea, the outspoken Rocket, the street-smart Blondie and the fiercely loyal Amber - to band together and try to escape a terrible fate at the hands of their captors, Blue and Madam Gorski, before the mysterious High Roller comes for Babydoll. Led by Babydoll, the girls engage in fantastical warfare against everything from samurais to serpents, with a virtual arsenal at their disposal. Together, they must decide what they are willing to sacrifice in order to stay alive. But with the help of a Wise Man, their unbelievable journey - if they succeed - will set them free.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and US war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: After a catastrophic car crash, a young woman wakes up in an underground bunker with a man who claims to have saved her for an apocalyptic attack.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six people unwittingly find themselves locked in another series of escape rooms, slowly uncovering what they have in common to survive. Joining forces with two of the original survivors, they soon discover they've all played the game before.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: If they hear you, they hunt you. In this terrifyingly suspenseful thriller, a family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee Abbott are determined to find a way to protect their children at all costs while they desperately search for a way to fight back.

programme.title: Smokin' Aces
programme.desc: After snitching mob secrets to the FBI, a $1 million contract is put out on Buddy 'Aces' Israel. Now, everybody wants him dead.

programme.title: Kick-Ass
programme.desc: A story where an ordinary New York teenager and rabid comic book geek dons a green and yellow wetsuit to become the no-nonsense vigilante, Kick-Ass. The eager young hero quickly becomes a phenomenon, capturing the imagination of the public. He's not the only superhero out there. A fearless father-daughter crime-fighting duo, Big Daddy and Hit Girl, have been slowly but surely taking down the criminal empire of local Mafioso, Frank D'Amico.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Desperate to find their missing son, Paul and his wife Amanda trick eminent palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant into accompanying them to Isla Sorna. The small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: Lincoln Six-Echo is running for his life - a life he knows little about except for two things. One: Authorities at the tightly controlled facility that sheltered him said he would someday live in the paradise that is Earth's last inhabitable place. Two: It was all a lie. Scrambling to elude deadly pursuers in an outside world they've never before experienced.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: It is the year 1250 BC, during the late Bronze Age. Two emerging nations begin to clash after Paris, the Trojan prince, convinces Helen, Queen of Sparta, to leave her husband Menelaus, and sail with him back to Troy. After Menelaus finds out that his wife was taken by the Trojans, he asks his brother Agamemnon to help him get her back. Agamemnon sees this as an opportunity for power. So they set off for Troy with 1000 ships holding 50,000 Greeks. With the help of Achilles, the Greeks are able to fight the never-before-defeated Trojans, but they come to a stop by Hector, Prince of Troy.

programme.title: Blade Runner 2049
programme.desc: A new blade runner, LAPD Officer K, unearths a long-buried secret that leads him on a quest to find Rick Deckard, who's been missing for 30 years.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete has escaped to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit that leaves a bullet in a senator and Machete a wanted man. Machete sets out to clear his name and expose a deep conspiracy. But standing in his way are a ruthless businessman with an endless payroll of killers, a twisted border vigilante leading a small army, and a beautiful Immigration officer torn between enforcing the law and doing what is right.

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: When a mysterious virus turns people into mindless, flesh-eating zombies, a handful of survivors wage a desperate, last-stand battle to stay alive and human.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Dispatched on a rescue mission to the farthest reaches of space, Captain Kirk, Spock and the crew become separated when they are ambushed with no means of escape.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels, three investigative agents (Barrymore, Diaz and Liu) who work for the Charles Townsend Detective Agency, return for another high-octane series of adventures as they investigate the theft of a database of witness protection profiles, after five of the people on the list are murdered. They're aided by a new Bosley (Bernie Mac), in an adventure which pits them against a fallen angel (Moore), their old nemesis, the Thin Man (Glover), and others.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In the year 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, who live on a pristine man-made space station called Elysium, and the rest, who live on an overpopulated, ruined Earth. The people of Earth are desperate to escape the planet's crime and poverty, and they critically need the state-of-the-art medical care available on Elysium - but some in Elysium will stop at nothing to enforce anti-immigration laws and preserve their citizens' luxurious lifestyle. The only man with the chance bring equality to these worlds is Max, an ordinary guy in desperate need to get to Elysium. With his life hanging in the balance, he reluctantly takes on a dangerous mission - one that pits him against Elysium's Secretary Delacourt and her hard-line forces - but if he succeeds, he could save not only his own life, but millions of people on Earth as well.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Wesley's life is over, his pathetic old one, anyway. Fortunately, it is all because of a girl. Enter sizzling-hot Fox, who crashes into his life and introduces him to the Fraternity, a secret society of assassins, led by the enigmatic Sloan. Seems Wes's long-lost father was killed while working for the Fraternity and Wes has been selected to target the rogue member who murdered him. But before he can complete his assignment, Wes must first uncover the dark secrets behind the Fraternity in order to determine his own destiny.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete has escaped to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit that leaves a bullet in a senator and Machete a wanted man. Machete sets out to clear his name and expose a deep conspiracy. But standing in his way are a ruthless businessman with an endless payroll of killers, a twisted border vigilante leading a small army, and a beautiful Immigration officer torn between enforcing the law and doing what is right.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: Sympathy For The Devil
programme.desc: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Old
programme.desc: A family on a tropical holiday discover that the secluded beach where they are relaxing is somehow causing them to age rapidly, reducing their entire lives to a single day.

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: After they are attacked by members of a satanic cult, a couple moves house, only to discover that an evil entity has come with them, attaching itself to a vintage doll called Annabelle.

programme.title: Kick-Ass 2
programme.desc: Self-made superhero Kick-Ass and sweet-faced, foul-mouthed assassin Hit Girl try to return to life as 'normal' teenagers, but soon they are faced with their deadliest challenge yet. To seek revenge for his father's death, Red Mist has re-invented himself as the leader of an evil league of super-villains. To defeat their new nemesis, Kick-Ass and Hit Girl must team up with a new wave of masked crusaders, led by the badass Colonel Stars and Stripes, in this battle of real-life villains and heroes.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: There's a traitor in the heart of America's most secret spy network, the Impossible Mission Force. He or she is trying to steal IMF's critical agent list which would give America's enemies the names of every covert operative in the world. When a mission goes badly wrong, agent Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is suspected of being the turncoat and becomes a hunted man. With all the might of IMF now turned against him, Hunt must flush out the real traitor - even if that means stealing the secret list himself.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: A talented young getaway driver relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. When he meets the girl of his dreams, Baby sees a chance to ditch his criminal life and make a clean getaway. But after being coerced into working for a crime boss, he must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Langdon discovers evidence of the resurgence of an ancient secret brotherhood known as the Illuminati, he also faces a deadly threat to the existence of the secret organisation's most despised enemy: the Catholic Church. When he learns that the clock is ticking on an unstoppable Illuminati time bomb, he jets to Rome where he joins forces with beautiful Italian scientist Vittoria Vetra and together they follow a 400-year-old trail of ancient symbols that mark the Vatican's only hope for survival.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: The famous symbologist Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia and finds himself the target of a manhunt. Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks; a doctor he hopes will help him recover his memories. Together, they race across Europe and against the clock to stop a virus that would wipe out half of the world's population.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Terminator: Genisys
programme.desc: As he battles to save the human race, a futuristic soldier sends his right-hand man back to the past in order to protect his mother.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2: The Enfield Poltergeist
programme.desc: The supernatural demonologists must travel to London to help a single mother and her four children when their house is plagued by malicious spirits.

programme.title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
programme.desc: Fearing the actions of a god-like superhero left unchecked, Gotham City's own formidable, forceful vigilante takes on Metropolis's most revered, modern-day saviour, while the world wrestles with what sort of hero it really needs. With Batman and Superman at war with one another, a new threat quickly arises, putting mankind in greater danger than it's ever known before.

programme.title: The Eagle
programme.desc: In 140 AD, 20 years after the unexplained disappearance of the entire Ninth Legion in the mountains of Scotland, young centurion Marcus Aquila arrives from Rome to solve the mystery and restore the reputation of his father, the commander of the Ninth. Accompanied only by his British slave Esca, Marcus sets out across Hadrian's Wall into the uncharted highlands of Caledonia to confront its savage tribes, make peace with his father's memory, and retrieve the lost legion's golden emblem, the Eagle of the Ninth.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Dom Cobb is the best there is at extraction: stealing valuable secrets inside the subconscious during the mind's vulnerable dream state. His skill has made him a coveted player in industrial espionage but also has made him a fugitive and cost him dearly. Now he may get a second chance if he can do the impossible: inception, planting an idea rather than stealing one. If they succeed, Cobb and his team could pull off the perfect crime. But no planning or expertise can prepare them for a dangerous enemy that seems to predict their every move. An enemy only Cobb could have seen coming.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: The famous symbologist Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia and finds himself the target of a manhunt. Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks; a doctor he hopes will help him recover his memories. Together, they race across Europe and against the clock to stop a virus that would wipe out half of the world's population.

programme.title: Snakes on a Plane
programme.desc: A fast paced, edge of your seat thrill ride. FBI agent Flynn is on a mission: transport a federally protected witness from Hawaii to Los Angeles so the government can put a brutal mob boss behind bars. But, just as the plane reached 30,000 feet, hundreds of venomous snakes are unleashed, causing violent mayhem as the vicious predators attack everyone in sight. With the help of L.A.'s leading snake expert on the ground, Flynn leads the other passengers on a desperate, action-packed fight for their lives.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: With our time on Earth coming to an end, a team of explorers undertakes the most important mission in human history: travelling beyond this galaxy to discover whether mankind has a future among the stars.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: Based on the character created by bestselling author Tom Clancy, Jack Ryan is a global action thriller set in the present day. This original story follows a young Jack as he uncovers a financial terrorist plot. The story follows him from 9/11, through his tour of duty in Afghanistan, which scarred him forever, and into his early days in the Financial Intelligence Unit of the modern CIA where he becomes an analyst, under the guardianship of his handler, Harper. When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to becoming a spy and must fight to save his own life and those of countless others, while also trying to protect the thing that's more important to him than anything, his relationship with his fiancee Cathy.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of a team of unlikely underdogs - a struggling working-class gamer, a failed former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive. Together, they risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world. Gran Turismo is an inspiring, thrilling, and action-packed story that proves that nothing is impossible when you're fuelled from within.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Desperate to find their missing son, Paul and his wife Amanda trick eminent palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant into accompanying them to Isla Sorna. The small team embark on a dangerous task, searching through a deserted island inhabited by ferocious dinosaurs.

programme.title: Carrie
programme.desc: A re-imagining of the classic horror tale about Carrie White, a shy girl outcast by her peers and sheltered by her deeply religious mother, who unleashes telekinetic terror on her small town after being pushed too far at her senior prom.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: A socially-conscious horror film set along the Northern California coastline. The original thriller follows Adelaide, her husband Gabe, and their two children, on a summer getaway that takes a nightmarish turn when they encounter terrifying doppelgangers of themselves.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: It has been four years since the disaster at Jurassic Park and two groups are in a race against time that will determine the fate of the remote island's prehistoric inhabitants.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: Robin Hood, the legendary figure of 13th century England, who along with his band of marauders confront corruption in the local village of Nottingham and lead an uprising against the crown that will forever alter the balance of world power. Whether regarded as thief or hero, one man from humble beginnings will become an eternal symbol of freedom for his people.

programme.title: The Shallows
programme.desc: When a surfer is attacked by a great white shark 20 yards from shore, her short journey back to safety becomes the ultimate contest of wills.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: The mysterious story of two magicians whose intense rivalry leads them on a lifelong battle for supremacy full of obsession, deceit, and jealousy with dangerous and deadly consequences. From the time that they first met as young magicians on the rise, Robert Anglier and Alfred Borden were competitors. However, their friendly competition evolves into a bitter rivalry making them fierce enemies-for-life and consequently jeopardising the lives of everyone around them. Full of twists and turns, this film is set against the backdrop of turn-of-the-century London.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete has escaped to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit that leaves a bullet in a senator and Machete a wanted man. Machete sets out to clear his name and expose a deep conspiracy. But standing in his way are a ruthless businessman with an endless payroll of killers, a twisted border vigilante leading a small army, and a beautiful Immigration officer torn between enforcing the law and doing what is right.

programme.title: The Man from U.N.C.L.E.
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of the early 1960s, at the height of the Cold War, this action centres on CIA agent Solo and KGB agent Kuryakin. Forced to put aside longstanding hostilities, the two team up on a joint mission to stop a mysterious international criminal organisation, which is bent on destabilising the fragile balance of power through the proliferation of nuclear weapons and technology. The duo's only lead is the daughter of a vanished German scientist, who is the key to infiltrating the criminal organisation, and they must race against time to find him and prevent a worldwide catastrophe.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: The Jurassic World theme park lets guests experience the thrill of witnessing actual dinosaurs, but something ferocious lurks behind the park's attractions - a genetically modified dinosaur with savage capabilities. When the massive creature escapes, chaos erupts across the island. Now it's up to Owen and Claire to save the park's tourists from an all-out prehistoric assault.

programme.title: From Paris with Love
programme.desc: James Reece, personal aide to the US ambassador to France, is secretly moonlighting as a low-level CIA operative. Looking for more action, Reece accepts a job that teams him with wisecracking special agent Charlie Wax, a trigger-happy loose cannon sent to Paris on a mission of international importance. Now, Reece finds himself on the wildest ride of his life as the new partners pull out all the stops to annihilate the enemy.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: Greek general Themistokles of Athens leads the naval charge against invading Persian forces led by mortal-turned-god Xerxes and Artemisia, vengeful commander of the Persian navy.

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: A team of scientists aboard the International Space Station have their mission of discovery turn into one of primal fear when they find a rapidly evolving life form that caused extinction on Mars, and now threatens the crew and all life on Earth.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: A French drug kingpin offers a huge reward to anyone who can break him out of jail and only the LAPD's Special Weapons and Tactics team can prevent it.

programme.title: Wonder Woman 1984
programme.desc: In the vibrant, sleek 1980s, Wonder Woman will have to muster all her strength, wisdom and courage as she finds herself squaring off against Maxwell Lord and the Cheetah.

programme.title: Passengers
programme.desc: A spacecraft transporting thousands of people to a distant planet has a malfunction in its sleep chambers, and as a result two passengers are awakened 90 years too early.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: Undercover FBI agent Frank Castle (Thomas Jane) is crushed when his wife and children are killed after accidentally witnessing a mafia hit. With nothing left to lose or to live for, Castle becomes 'The Punisher' a one-man judge, jury and executioner who declares open season on criminals throughout America. Based on the Marvel Comics character, the film also stars John Travolta, Laura Harring, Samantha Mathis and Rebecca Romijn.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: A crashlanding puts a father and son on a dangerous planet - Earth. Hunted by an alien and by evolved animal species, the pair must work together to survive.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: When the abandoned island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: With the IMF disbanded, and Ethan out in the cold, the team now faces off against a network of highly skilled special agents, the Syndicate. These highly-trained operatives are hell-bent on creating a new world order through an escalating series of terrorist attacks. Ethan gathers his team and joins forces with disavowed British agent Ilsa Faust, who may or may not be a member of this rogue nation, as the group faces their most impossible mission yet.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: When an unknown caller puts a bomb in Matt Turner's car, he must complete a series of tasks. With his kids trapped in the back seat, he races to save his family.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: The peaceful realm of Azeroth stands on the brink of war as its civilisation faces a fearsome race of invaders: Orc warriors fleeing their dying home to colonise another. As a portal opens to connect the two worlds, one army faces destruction and the other faces extinction. From opposing sides, two heroes are set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home. So begins a spectacular saga of power and sacrifice in which war has many faces, and everyone fights for something.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Our friendly neighbourhood Super Hero decides to join his best friends Ned, MJ, and the rest of the gang on a European vacation. However, Peter's plan to leave super heroics behind for a few weeks are quickly scrapped when he begrudgingly agrees to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of several elemental creature attacks, creating havoc across the continent!

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: A gold prospector goes to extreme lengths to protect his treasure from a brutal Nazi death squad.

programme.title: This Is Where I Leave You
programme.desc: When their father dies, four grown siblings, bruised and banged up by their respective adult lives, are forced to return to their childhood home and live under the same roof together for a week.

programme.title: This Is 40
programme.desc: After years of marriage, Pete and Debbie are approaching a milestone meltdown as they try to balance romance, careers, parents and children in their own hilarious ways.

programme.title: The Change-Up
programme.desc: In this switching places comedy, two best friends wake up in each other's bodies after a drunken night, and become very alarmed with the outcome.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When David sublets his quaint San Francisco apartment, the last thing he expected - or wanted - was a room mate. He had only begun to make a complete mess of the place when a pretty young woman named Elizabeth suddenly shows up, adamantly insisting the apartment is hers. David assumes there's been a giant misunderstanding, until Elizabeth disappears as mysteriously as she appeared. Changing the locks does nothing to deter Elizabeth, who begins to appear and disappear at will.

programme.title: Vanity Fair
programme.desc: From the classic novel by William Makepeace Thackeray, the daughter of a starving English artist and a French chorus girl, Becky is orphaned at a young age. Even as a child, she yearns for a more glamorous life than her birth right promises. As she leaves Miss Pinkerton's Academy at Chiswick, Becky resolves to conquer English society by any means possible. She deploys all of her wit, guile, and sexuality as she makes her way up into high society during the first quarter of the 19th century.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: In this wildly funny battle of the sexes, Abby, a successful morning show producer, is looking for a lot in a man. Mike, her obnoxious TV star, knows men only want one thing. Determined to prove that she's not romantically challenged, Abby takes Mike's advice during a promising new romance, but the unexpected results will stun everyone.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: Maddie finds an enticing job ad: parents looking for someone to "date" their awkward son.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: It's 1985 and Robbie Hart is the ultimate master of ceremonies until he is left at the altar at his own wedding. Robbie starts to pick up the pieces of his heart after meeting Julia but she's about to have a wedding of her own.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: When two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives in the midst of a clandestine love affair find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, they'll put everything on the line to remain one double-cross ahead in a high-stakes game of cat-and-mouse.

programme.title: Captain Corelli's Mandolin
programme.desc: It's 1940 on the Greek isle of Cephalonia, and WWII is encroaching upon their land. Local physician Dr Iannis and his young adult daughter, Pelagia, have no love loss for the Italians or Germans, with Pelagia recently becoming engaged to Mandras, a local young man who's now headed off to fight in the war. As the months pass, however, Pelagia worries about her fiancee since she hasn't heard anything about or from him and soon believes the worst has happened. When an Italian artillery regiment arrives to occupy their land, one of its officers, Captain Antonio Corelli, is assigned to stay in their home and Pelagia wants nothing to do with Corelli. The captain, however, is more of a musician than fighter, often leading his regiment in song, with him leading the way on his ever present mandolin. His carefree and jovial ways soon begin to warm Pelagia's icy demeanour toward him, even with Mandras.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: Who's who behind the do? Its 1962 - the '50s are out and change is in the air. Tracey Turnblad, a big girl with big hair and an even bigger heart, has only one passion - dancing. Her dream is realised when she wins a spot on a local TV dance program, which is transformed overnight from outsider to teen celebrity. But can a trendsetter in dance and fashion defeat the program's reigning princess, win the heartthrob Link Larkin, and integrate television without messing up her hairdo?

programme.title: Charlotte Gray
programme.desc: A resourceful Scottish woman signs up with British Intelligence to find her missing pilot lover. Working undercover as a French housekeeper, she becomes drawn to a mysterious Resistance fighter and pursued by a sinister Nazi collaborator, requiring the plucky patriot to dig deep into her reservoirs of self-sacrifice.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc: As teenagers, Allie and Noah begin to fall in love, but they are separated by her upper-class parents who insist that Noah isn't right for her. When they meet years later, their passion is rekindled. Their story is narrated from the present day by an elderly man, telling the tale to a fellow nursing home resident, who is Cassavetes' mother.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: After his wife Emily's confession that she had a fling with her co-worker David and that she wants a divorce, Cal starts to haunt his local bar, devastated at his situation. He observes a handsome young womaniser, Jacob, in action as he lays slick moves on various young ladies, but is surprised when Jacob notices his incessant sad-sack rantings. Jacob offers to help Cal get back in the dating game, and Cal is astonished when the combination of an image makeover and some smart tips actually work.

programme.title: Sex and the City
programme.desc: Carrie Bradshaw, successful author and everyone's favourite fashion icon-next-door, is back, her famously sardonic wit intact and sharper than ever, as she continues to narrate her own story about sex, love and the fashion-obsessed single woman in New York City. Sex and the City finds Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte, and Miranda four years after the hit series ended, as our favourite friends continue to juggle jobs and relationships while navigating motherhood, marriage and Manhattan real estate.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: Ali is a small-town singer who moves to the big city for her chance at stardom. She is enchanted by Burlesque, a glamorous nightclub packed with dancers and sizzling music. Tess is the owner in need of a star, as she is struggling to keep the club alive and fend off wealthy developers who want to buy it. Ali has a chance to make her dreams come true, if only she could make the right choices.

programme.title: Striptease
programme.desc: This raucous comedy is about a stripper/single mother who gets dragged into a dangerous situation after a congressman takes a fancy to her.

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: When time-poor Teddy wakes up the morning after his wedding to discover that every few minutes he's jumping forward to the next year of his life, he must use every precious moment wisely.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: Joy Ride
programme.desc: Asian American adoptee Audrey Sullivan is living the dream. Raised in the picturesque small town of White Hills, she has a successful law career, a close relationship with her parents, and her longtime best friend, Lolo, literally lives in her backyard. But Audrey is ready for more. To become a partner at her law firm and leave White Hills behind, she just needs to close one important deal with a client in China. Sounds straightforward enough, until Lolo encourages Audrey to use the trip to locate her birth mother. Oh, and Lolos eccentric cousin, Deadeye, is coming along. So is Kat, a glamorous Chinese soap opera star who roomed with Audrey in college.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: Believing there's more to life than a husband, house and career, Liz Gilbert finds herself with a new appetite for life. She leaves New York and embarks on a yearlong journey, traveling to Italy, India and Bali, seeking self-discovery through good food, meditation and the prospect of finding true love.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents and their kids find themselves stuck together on an African wildlife holiday where things go from bad to worse.

programme.title: Rock of Ages
programme.desc: The story of small town girl Sherrie and city boy Drew, who meet on the Sunset Strip while pursuing their Hollywood dreams. Their rock 'n' roll romance is told through the heart-pounding hits of Def Leppard, Joan Jett, Journey, Foreigner, Bon Jovi, and more.

programme.title: Burlesque
programme.desc: Ali is a small-town singer who moves to the big city for her chance at stardom. She is enchanted by Burlesque, a glamorous nightclub packed with dancers and sizzling music. Tess is the owner in need of a star, as she is struggling to keep the club alive and fend off wealthy developers who want to buy it. Ali has a chance to make her dreams come true, if only she could make the right choices.

programme.title: Maybe I Do
programme.desc: Michelle and Allen are in a relationship and decide to invite their parents to finally meet. Turns out, the parents already know one another well, which leads to some differing opinions about marriage.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding 3
programme.desc: Join the Portokalos family as they travel to a family reunion in Greece for a heartwarming and hilarious trip full of love, twists and turns.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: Maddie finds an enticing job ad: parents looking for someone to "date" their awkward son.

programme.title: Baby Mama
programme.desc: Kate is a single, successful career woman who wants something more, a baby. But she gets more than she bargained for when she hires Angie, a free spirit from South Philly, to be her surrogate in a hysterical mama match-up. From birth class to baby-proofing, they're the ultimate odd couple.

programme.title: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: Ben is travelling to Savannah for his upcoming wedding to Bridget. On take-off his plane suffers an accident. Now terrified of flying, he agrees to travel with the free-spirited Sarah who also needs to get to Savannah.

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: Sam Lombardo is a guidance counsellor at Florida's Blue Bay High School. Kelly Van Ryan is a student who has a crush on him. One afternoon, she comes to his house to wash his car, and, when she leaves, her clothing is torn. After confessing to her mother that she was raped, she goes to the police station, where she tells her story to detectives Ray Duquette and Gloria Perez. They are sceptical about here claims until another girl, Suzie Toller, comes forward with a similar tale. Meanwhile, Sam, convinced that he's being set up, goes to a shyster lawyer for help.

programme.title: All My Life
programme.desc: Inspired by a powerful true love story, a young couple make the difficult decision to accelerate their wedding plans following the groom's devastating cancer diagnosis.

programme.title: Leatherheads
programme.desc: Dodge Connelly, captain of a struggling squad of barroom brawlers, has only one hope to save his team: recruit college superstar Carter Rutherford. But when a feisty reporter starts snooping around, she turns the two teammates into instant rivals and kicks off a wild competition filled with hilarious screwball antics.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A bodyguard is sent to protect a pop-music diva from a homicidal fan. At first repelled by each other, passion ignites as danger explodes around them.

programme.title: The Mexican
programme.desc: Before reckless Jerry can make amends with Samantha, he has to take one more wild ride down to Mexico to pick up a priceless antique pistol and settle his debts. As things begin heating up with mob bosses and hitmen, the action bolts over with surprise twists and turns.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When David sublets his quaint San Francisco apartment, the last thing he expected - or wanted - was a room mate. He had only begun to make a complete mess of the place when a pretty young woman named Elizabeth suddenly shows up, adamantly insisting the apartment is hers. David assumes there's been a giant misunderstanding, until Elizabeth disappears as mysteriously as she appeared. Changing the locks does nothing to deter Elizabeth, who begins to appear and disappear at will.

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give
programme.desc: Harry Sanborn is a perennial playboy with a libido much younger than his years. During what was to have been a romantic weekend with his latest infatuation, Marin, at her mother's Hamptons beach house, Harry develops chest pains. He winds up being nursed by Marin's reluctant mother, Erica Barry, a successful, divorced New York playwright. In the process, Harry develops more heart pangs - the romantic kind - for Erica, an age-appropriate woman who he finds beguiling. However, some habits die hard. When Harry hesitates, his charming thirty-something doctor steps in and starts to pursue Erica. And Harry, who has always had the world on a string, finds his life unravelling.

programme.title: Maybe I Do
programme.desc: Michelle and Allen are in a relationship and decide to invite their parents to finally meet. Turns out, the parents already know one another well, which leads to some differing opinions about marriage.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Ivana Trump's galvanising cameo - 'don't get mad, dahlinks, get everytink' - sets the scene in a comedy that hinges on the self-mockery of its ageless stars. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: An old-school anchorman who quit his longtime evening newscast because of its new, gossipy ways is recruited by a hotshot producer who is looking to revive a failing morning show.

programme.title: Jude
programme.desc: Michael Winterbottom (Butterfly Kiss) directs this powerful, stunningly photographed adaptation based on Thomas Hardy's bleak and shocking novel "Jude the Obscure", published in 1895. Sue, a woman stuck in an abusive marriage, falls in love with the unhappily married Jude, a stonemason whose dreams of becoming a scholar are crushed by the British social system, by fate and by his being tricked into marriage by a pig farmer's daughter. Jude and Sue are rejected by their community and forced to live in abject poverty in this unforgettable and tragic love story. The novel created such an uproar when it was published that Hardy never wrote another one, retreating into his poetry and an old age of rural seclusion.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: Based on Philippa Gregory's acclaimed best-selling novel, this brilliant retelling of the story of Anne Boleyn is centred around the claustrophobic intrigue that was the court of Henry VIII, this historical drama presents a calculating Anne, who usurps her older sister Mary as the king's mistress and ultimately desires to be his new queen. A sophisticated and complex study of ambition and deception, this is a compelling and well-acted film made all the more powerful when one remembers the brutal fate of most of Henry's wives. Trivia: At the outset of their relationship with Henry, Mary was characterised as being innocent and morally upright. Actually, she had spent time in France, was reputed to have had several affairs. One of Henry's reasons for not wanting her except as a consort is that she was regarded as promiscuous.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A culinary legend Julia Child provides a frustrated office worker with a new recipe for life - the true stories of how Child's life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking. A delicious comedy about joy, obsession and butter. Bon appetit!

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Mona Lisa Smile
programme.desc: A funny, inspiring and uplifting film about an art history professor with a lot to teach about life and much to learn about romance.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Pro tennis "hot shot" Lizzie Bradbury is a rising star who lives to win. But when she falls for long-shot contender Peter Colt amid the glitz and glamour of Wimbledon, Lizzie discovers it's not if you win or lose, but how you play the game of love. A deliciously witty romantic comedy about chasing your dreams and risking your heart, this filmis a fun and charming story of love across the net.

programme.title: One Day
programme.desc: In this adaptation of David Nicholl's popular novel, Anne Hathaway and Jim Sturgess star as a couple who fall in love on the day they meet in 1988. Over 20 years, snapshots of that relationship are revealed on the same day - July 15th - of each year. As time passes, they face squabbles and fights, hopes and missed opportunities, laughter and tears. As the true meaning of this one crucial day is revealed, they must come to grips with the nature of love and life itself.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Notting Hill
programme.desc: Anna Scott is the world's most famous movie star. Her picture has been plastered on the cover of every magazine, and every time she makes a movie, the entire world knows about it. William Thacker owns a travel bookstore in the quaint neighbourhood of Notting Hill. His business is stagnant, he has the roommate from hell and his love life is completely non-existent. Then one day, their paths cross and the couple comes to face the ultimate question: can two people fall in love with the whole world watching?

programme.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
programme.desc: Rose Morgan, who still lives with her mother, is a professor of Romantic Literature who desperately longs for passion in her life. Gregory Larkin, a mathematics professor, has been burned by passionate relationships and longs for a sexless union based on friendship and respect. They're two people with almost nothing in common, but fate in the form of a personal ad and a meddling sister brings them together.
