programme.desc: When a lethal airborne virus with the power to wipe out humanity is unleashed, the worldwide medical community races to find a vaccine and stop the panic from spreading. This edge-of-your-seat thriller follows the deadly path of a virus that is beyond containment. Researchers for disease control, the military, the World Health Organisation and ordinary civilians mobilise to try and find a cure and the cause before it's too late. This portrait of suspense examines how courage pulls us together, while society is falling apart.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A tough cop, a clever bank robber, and a powerbroker fuel a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse full of hidden agendas and explosive surprises.

programme.title: Blood Work
programme.desc: After a heart transplant, a retired, feeble FBI profiler goes back to work to track down a notorious serial killer who has begun killing victims with the former agent's blood type.

programme.title: Of an Age
programme.desc: A Serbian ballroom dancer experiences an unexpected and intense 24-hour romance with a friend's older brother.

programme.title: Bernard and Doris
programme.desc: A hypothetical, behind-the-scenes story of tobacco heiress Doris Duke and her Irish butler, Bernard. Doris was the world's richest woman, a society icon with a reputation for being difficult and demanding. Bernard was a closeted homosexual who, despite his subordinate status and troubled history with alcohol abuse, ended up the primary beneficiary of her estate. Theirs was a love story that nobody could have imagined, until now.

programme.title: Native Son
programme.desc: A young African-American man's dalliance with a wealthy white family takes a disastrous turn in this modern re-imagining of Richard Wright's haunting novel.

programme.title: Mulholland Drive
programme.desc: A mind-altering journey to the dark heart of the American dream, where sinister forces lurk beneath every surface. Naive ingenue Betty Elms has comes to Hollywood to seek fame and fortune - but she finds something much more disturbing waiting in her apartment - a mysterious woman whose only memory is that someone is trying to kill her. What begins as a simple premise unfolds into a shattering hallucinogenic vision of what it takes to make it in Hollywood. No one comes out with the soul intact.

programme.title: Asteroid City
programme.desc: The annual Junior Stargazer competition is spectacularly upended by world-changing events.

programme.title: Honey Boy
programme.desc: From a screenplay by Shia LaBeouf, based on his own experiences, brings to life a young actor's stormy childhood and early adult years as he struggles to reconcile with his father.

programme.title: Falcone
programme.desc: Determined to break the reign of the Mafia in Italy, Giovanni Falcone, a brave lawyer, dared to challenge the Cosa Nostra. This is his story.

programme.title: Storm Boy (2018)
programme.desc: A young boy rescues and raises three orphaned pelicans. But when he forms a close bond with them, he finds himself at odds with his fisherman father.

programme.title: Goodfellas
programme.desc: Based on the bestselling biography, Henry Hill is a small time gangster, who takes part in a violent robbery with two ambitious gangsters.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life to the expense of his regular one.

programme.title: Last Night In Soho
programme.desc: Edgar Wright's psychological thriller follows a young woman mysteriously able to enter the glamorous 1960s, where the dreams of the past splinter into something darker.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A murderer is loose on the streets of Manhattan. A diabolical killer whose brutal slayings leave a trail of cryptic messages hidden at the scene of the crime. Clues which only a brilliant mind can interpret. Lincoln Rhyme is a gifted but disabled detective who is assigned to the case as the city becomes gripped with fear. Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: Tyson
programme.desc: Boxer Mike Tyson's life story shows his rise to heavyweight champion and his plunge to felon.

programme.title: As Good as it Gets
programme.desc: An antisocial writer, a single mother, and a gay artist become unlikely friends in this comedy-drama.

programme.title: Angela's Ashes
programme.desc: Life in impoverished Depression-era Ireland holds little promise for young Frank McCourt, the oldest son in a tight-knit family. Living by his wits, cheered by his irrepressible spirit, and sustained by his mother's fierce love, Frank embarks on an inspiring journey to overcome the poverty of his childhood and reach the land of his dreams: America.

programme.title: Penguin Bloom
programme.desc: A young mother's world is shattered after a near-fatal accident leaves her paralysed. As she and her family struggle to adjust, an unlikely ally enters their world: an injured baby magpie.

programme.title: Brokeback Mountain
programme.desc: Set against the sweeping landscapes of Wyoming and Texas, this epic love story tells of two young men - a ranch-hand and a rodeo cowboy - who meet in the summer of 1963 while driving cattle on a mountain range. They unexpectedly forge a lifelong connection, one whose complications, joys and tragedies provide a testament to the endurance and power of love.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Mel Gibson first made his mark on movie history as heroic loner Max, who drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other scraggly defenders of a fuel-depot encampment are the bizarre warriors commanded by The Humungus, notorious for never taking prisoners when they can pulverize them instead. With The Road Warrior on your side, screen action doesn't get any better.

programme.title: Brewster's Millions
programme.desc: Montgomery Brewster is a minor league baseball pitcher who discovers he has to blow $30 million in 30 days as a condition to inherit a much greater fortune. Here's the catch, he will forfeit everything if he reveals to a soul the real reason he seems to be throwing away all that cash. With the help of his pal Spike they set off on a frantic spending spree the likes of which would bring any self-respecting accountant to his knees.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: U.S. Marshals
programme.desc: We are initiating a hard-target search for a fugitive in an ever-widening perimeter. We will navigate swamps, prowl Manhattan streets, search every house and doghouse. And since Marshal Sam Gerard leads the hunt, we will experience suspense, action and daring twists every step of the way.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Montana
programme.desc: Ranchers and their children are divided over whether to sell their land.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe to go back in the water, another shark terrorises the resort of Amity as it recovers from the first man-eater. Police Chief Brody returns to kill.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An ambitious genetic experiment takes the wrong turn when two twins - who look nothing alike - are born and then separated. Years later, the unlikely siblings meet: Julius, a highly educated but sheltered giant with a big heart, and Vincent, a pint-sized hustler with an insatiable lust for women and money. With girlfriends in tow and a hitman on their tail, the new-found brothers set off on a wild, cross-country misadventure to find their mother - but end up finding out more about themselves.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the enigmatic and opportunistic businessman Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust. This emotional film chronicles the trials and triumphs of one man who made a difference, and the tribulations of those who survived one of the darkest chapters in human history because of his actions.

programme.title: Memphis Belle
programme.desc: In 1943, the crew of a B-17 based in the UK prepares for its 25th and final bombing mission over Germany before returning home to the USA.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning. Their hilarious high jinx spoof airplane disaster flicks, religious zealots, television commercials, and romantic love the lists whirls by in rapid succession. And the story races from one moment of zany fun to the next!

programme.title: The Pentagon Wars
programme.desc: An Air Force colonel threatens to reveal the truth behind the military's $14 billion investment in a transport vehicle.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces. Unaccustomed to suburban life, fun-loving Uncle Buck soon charms his younger relatives Miles and Maizy with his hefty cooking and his new way of doing the laundry. His carefree style does not impress everyone though, especially his rebellious teenage niece, Tia, and his impatient girlfriend, Chanice. With a little bit of luck and a lot of love, Uncle Buck manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists lose their research grant and decide to open their own business, Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment. What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula, the vampire doomed as a creature of the night after forsaking God, is aroused by the image of a woman resembling his lost love.

programme.title: With Six You Get Eggroll
programme.desc: Two widowed people fall in love and marry, unprepared for the hostile reactions of their children.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Audrey Hepburn is Holly Golightly, the New York playgirl who lives off the gifts of gents like George Peppard.

programme.title: Witch Hunt
programme.desc: Detective Philip Lovecraft lives in Los Angeles in the 1950s when an ambitious Senator is holding hearings, on Magic. Magic is the new influence in Tinsel Town. Lovecraft is unique in that he is the only one who refuses to use magic in his work. Shortly after he is hired, he finds his client, Kim Hudson, accused of the murder of her husband, a film executive. Philip uses the talents of a local witch, Kropotkin, to explain what is happening only to see her accused of the murder and sentenced to be burned at the stake.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Jaws 3
programme.desc: When a young great white shark gets into a theme park, the manager keeps it for a new exhibit. But he didn't expect the angry mother to turn up looking for it.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously. One spring day, toward the end of his senior year, Ferris (Matthew Broderick) gives in to an overwhelming urge to cut school and head for downtown Chicago with his girl (Mia Sara) and his best friend (Alan Ruck), to see the sights, experience a day of freedom and show that with a little ingenuity, a bit of courage and a red Ferrari, life at 17 can be a joy. Featuring Charlie Sheen and Jennifer Grey, it's of the most iconic films of the 80s, and one of writer/director John Hughes' best.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A squad of raw Marines endure boot camp under a terrifying drill instructor before descending into the horror of battle.

programme.title: Every Which Way But Loose
programme.desc: Philo Beddoe likes beer, brawling and country music. When he falls for a sexy singer, he sets out to win her with Clyde his orangutan in tow.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray is at his wry, wisecracking best in this riotous romantic comedy about a weatherman caught in a personal time warp on the worst day of his life. Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities. But on his way out of town, Phil is caught in a giant blizzard, which he failed to predict, and finds himself stuck in small-town hell. Just when things couldn't get any worse, they do. Phil wakes the next morning to find it is Groundhog Day all over again and again and again.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: Mikey the wisecracking tot acquires a baby sister with the same wry sense of humor. Meanwhile their parents have emerged out of wedded bliss to face some real-life issues involving money problems and a gun-toting relative. Mikey is also learning how to use the toilet for the first time.

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: Walter and Anna believe they've arrived 'home sweet home' when they buy the house of their dreams. But life quickly becomes a nightmare as their dilapidated mansion falls apart around them, and they struggle to stay together even as they slide further into the money pit. It's outrageous entertainment for anyone who's ever been deeply in love or deeply in debt or both.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: From Wayne's basement, Wayne and Garth broadcast a talk-show called "Wayne's World" on local public access television. The show comes to the attention of a sleazy network executive who wants to produce a big-budget version of "Wayne's World"-and he also wants Wayne's girlfriend, a rock singer named Cassandra. Wayne and Garth have to battle the executive not only to save their show, but also Cassandra.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: This rock 'n' roll spy spoof is about an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter. Non-stop pop-up cameos, pelvis-shaking parodies and dead-pan homage to WWII underground heroics make this an overlooked gem.

programme.title: Wildcats
programme.desc: As the daughter of a legendary grid iron star, a young woman's greatest desire is to coach a team of her own. But when the chauvinistic powers-that-be assign her to an inner-city ghetto school, the spirited female has her work cut out for her.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: After the release of Jake Blues from prison, he and brother Elwood go to visit the orphanage where they were raised by nuns. They learn that the church stopped its support and will sell the place unless the tax on the property is paid within 11 days. The brothers decide to raise the money by putting their blues band back together and staging a big gig. They may be on a 'mission from God' but they're making enemies everywhere they go.

programme.title: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Celebrate good friends as they reunite for the funeral of a college pal. During the weekend that follows, these friends compare their '60s ideas with the harsh reality of their lives in the '80s, and discover that in a cold world, you need your friends to keep you warm.

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century New Orleans, a wealthy merchant enacts a fatal plan to break the Italians' control of the docks.

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Two retired, down-on-their-luck outlaws pick up their guns one last time to collect a bounty offered by the vengeful prostitutes of the remote Wyoming town of Big Whiskey. English Bob is an ill-fated interloper, a colourful killer-for-hire. There is also the sly and brutal local sheriff, whose brand of law enforcement ranges from unconventional to ruthless. Big trouble is coming to Big Whiskey.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Former CIA analyst Jack Ryan travels to London with his wife and child. Upon being caught in the middle of a terrorist attack on a member of the royal family, Ryan helps to thwart the assailants. Ryan's courageous act, however, marks him and his family as a target for revenge in the sights of the terrorist whose brother Ryan killed.

programme.title: The Last Outlaw
programme.desc: Left for dead by his bank robbing gang, a marauder joins a posse to seek revenge.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: The Tuskegee Airmen
programme.desc: The true story of how a group of African American pilots overcame racist opposition to become one of the finest US fighter groups in World War II.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: In the year 1971, San Francisco faces the terror of a maniac known as Scorpio, who snipes at innocent victims and demands ransom through notes left at the scene of the crime. Inspector Harry Callahan (known as Dirty Harry by his peers through his reputation handling of homicidal cases) is assigned to the case along with his newest partner Inspector Chico Gonzalez to track down Scorpio and stop him. Using humiliation and cat and mouse type of games against Callahan, Scorpio is put to the test with the cop with a dirty attitude.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A tough Detroit cop is treading on toes in posh Beverly Hills whilst trying to track down a killer who murdered his good friend. Foley's not-quite-by-the-book way of doing things doesn't go down well with the local authorities or the bad guys. Detectives Rosewood and Taggart are ordered to follow Foley and ensure he doesn't get in any trouble, but it's Foley who shows them a thing or two about sneaky detective work.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: The World According to Garp
programme.desc: This story chronicles the life of T. S. Garp, the illegitimate son of a feminist mother, who is a quirky everyman, a wistful writer wrestling with our screw loose modern age.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: Audrey Hepburn is Holly Golightly, the New York playgirl who lives off the gifts of gents like George Peppard.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Following a mysterious treasure map into a spectacular underground realm of twisting passages, outrageous booby-traps and a long-lost pirate ship full of golden doubloons, the kids race to stay one step ahead of a family of bumbling bad guys and a mild mannered monster with a face only a mother could love.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Mismatched detective duo Riggs and Murtaugh are onto a gang using diplomatic immunity to traffic in cocaine.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: Michael Dorsey is a talented actor, but his demanding nature and stubborn temperament have antagonised every producer in New York. Now his agent insists no one will hire him. But Michael needs money, eight thousand dollars to be exact, and to earn it, he's willing to play the role of a lifetime. This out-of-work actor finds success, love and frustration when he gets the role of his life playing a woman.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: The wackiest head counsellor in North Star camp history, Tripper Harrison devotes his summer activities to cracking jokes, chasing female staffers, and plotting the demise of their evil rich rivals, the snotty young brats at nearby Camp Mohawk. Jam-packed with hysterical off-the-wall hjinks, drop-dead gorgeous babes in the woods and the riotous one-liners, Meatballs is an "Animal House goes to summer camp".

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray is at his wry, wisecracking best in this riotous romantic comedy about a weatherman caught in a personal time warp on the worst day of his life. Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities. But on his way out of town, Phil is caught in a giant blizzard, which he failed to predict, and finds himself stuck in small-town hell. Just when things couldn't get any worse, they do. Phil wakes the next morning to find it is Groundhog Day all over again and again and again.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When Saturday detention started, they were the Jock, the Princess, the Brain, the Criminal, and the Basket Case, but by that afternoon they had become closer than any of them could have imagined.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: An extraordinary tale of hope, friendship and survival inside a maximum security prison. Andy Dufresne is a soft-spoken, respected Maine banker who is convicted for the murders of his unfaithful wife and her lover. He receives a double-life sentence and is shipped off to Shawshank State Prison, Maine's toughest maximum security penitentiary. Despised at first by the other inmates because of his introverted manner, he slowly forges an unlikely friendship with the prison fixer, Red, and they both learn that hope is the ultimate means of survival.

programme.title: Better Off Dead
programme.desc: After his girlfriend ditches him for a boorish ski jock, Lane decides that suicide is the only answer. However, his increasingly inept attempts bring him only more agony and embarrassment.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: The Replacement Killers
programme.desc: International superstar Chow Yun-Fat makes his Hollywood debut with Oscar (R) winner Mira Sorvino in THE REPLACEMENT KILLERS, a fierce and explosive action thriller from director Antoine Fuqua. After he betrays Mr. Wei, the ruthless crime boss who hired him to avenge his son's death, professional killer John Lee (chow Yun-Fat) goes on the run. Enlisting the aid of beautiful document forger Meg Coburn (Mira Sorvino), Lee attempts to return to his family in China before they are victimised by his betrayal. But Wei's army of "replacement killers" is hot on his trail, and now both he and Meg are targets of their impressive firepower. With both sides fully armed and determined to fight to the death, an ultra-violent shootout breaks out when they finally face off against each other.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A squad of raw Marines endure boot camp under a terrifying drill instructor before descending into the horror of battle.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Mel Gibson first made his mark on movie history as heroic loner Max, who drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other scraggly defenders of a fuel-depot encampment are the bizarre warriors commanded by The Humungus, notorious for never taking prisoners when they can pulverize them instead. With The Road Warrior on your side, screen action doesn't get any better.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the enigmatic and opportunistic businessman Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust. This emotional film chronicles the trials and triumphs of one man who made a difference, and the tribulations of those who survived one of the darkest chapters in human history because of his actions.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: The Replacement Killers
programme.desc: International superstar Chow Yun-Fat makes his Hollywood debut with Oscar (R) winner Mira Sorvino in THE REPLACEMENT KILLERS, a fierce and explosive action thriller from director Antoine Fuqua. After he betrays Mr. Wei, the ruthless crime boss who hired him to avenge his son's death, professional killer John Lee (chow Yun-Fat) goes on the run. Enlisting the aid of beautiful document forger Meg Coburn (Mira Sorvino), Lee attempts to return to his family in China before they are victimised by his betrayal. But Wei's army of "replacement killers" is hot on his trail, and now both he and Meg are targets of their impressive firepower. With both sides fully armed and determined to fight to the death, an ultra-violent shootout breaks out when they finally face off against each other.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: Teenager Ren moves from Chicago with his family to a small town in the west, and he's in for a real case of culture shock. Led by the Reverend Shaw Moore, the people of Bomont want to out Ren as a troublemaker. The reverend's daughter Ariel doesn't quite see Ren in that light and they begin a clandestine relationship. Ren decides that this town needs a shake up: it needs to dance.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A hilarious, subversive and wickedly scary film about Gizmo the mogwai, a cuddly critter that multiplies with savage consequences. Great special effects and amazingly realistic mechanical creatures.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After a voice tells a farmer to put a baseball diamond in his cornfield, the ghosts of famous players begin to appear on it.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Defence lawyers Daniel Kaffee and Joanne Galloway are assigned the case of defending two US soldiers, accused of murdering a fellow soldier who was deemed to have 'broken the code'. Kaffee and Galloway soon run into a brick wall with Col Nathan Jessep, who sees himself as a military 'untouchable'. The accused claim they were obeying orders, and that the death was an accident.

programme.title: Sudden Impact
programme.desc: A victim of a savage rape exacts revenge on her aggressors in Clint Eastwood's fourth Dirty Harry movie. Considered to be the darkest, dirtiest and most violent one in the series.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden. Cady becomes a terrifying presence as he menacingly circles Bowden's increasingly unstable family. Realising he is legally powerless to protect his beautiful wife Leigh and his troubled teenage daughter Danielle, Sam resorts to unorthodox measures which lead to an unforgettable showdown on Cape Fear.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid/Hauser is haunted each night by a dream that he is on Mars looking for beautiful Melina. He goes against his wife Lori's wishes and visits the Recall laboratories. They claim that they can help make his dream a reality by offering him an adventurous trip in his mind with a powerful hallucinogenic drug. But the experience has unexpected consequences, the drug awakens a memory that was erased from Quaid's mind. In fact he is not Quaid, he is a dangerous terrorist fighting against a Martian despot, Lori is not his wife she is an enemy agent and the red planet is at the heart of a terrifying plot. Pitiless killers relentlessly chase Quaid and he goes to Mars where other memories and other dangers await him, including Melina, the woman of his dreams and he makes an incredible discovery about his own identity.

programme.title: The Terry Fox Story
programme.desc: The true story about the Canadian cancer amputee hero who decided to run across Canada on only one leg to raise money for cancer research.

programme.title: Lansky
programme.desc: Chronicling the beginnings of notorious mobster Meyer Lansky, a Jewish immigrant who established a successful career in gambling, bootlegging and racketeering and eventually murder.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A high-school boy in the early 1970s is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies them on their concert tour.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously. One spring day, toward the end of his senior year, Ferris (Matthew Broderick) gives in to an overwhelming urge to cut school and head for downtown Chicago with his girl (Mia Sara) and his best friend (Alan Ruck), to see the sights, experience a day of freedom and show that with a little ingenuity, a bit of courage and a red Ferrari, life at 17 can be a joy. Featuring Charlie Sheen and Jennifer Grey, it's of the most iconic films of the 80s, and one of writer/director John Hughes' best.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: The holidays are approaching and the Ubriacco household is wrapped up in more turmoil than tinsel. James has unexpectedly found prosperity and job satisfaction as a highly paid private pilot for Samantha D'Bonne, the glamorous president of an international cosmetics firm. But while her husband is winging around the world, Mollie has to juggle her role as mum with her duties at her new job, labouring as an elf for a department store Santa.

programme.desc: Saxton Oval in Nelson hosts the third and final T20I between New Zealand and Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Fox Footy Legends
programme.desc: Relive the best games and magic moments from the stars of our great game.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: The 2010s - With two new teams, a drawn grand final and plenty of new talent, it was certainly a decade of spellbinding AFL football.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: 1999 Preliminary Final. The Bombers and the Blues duke it out on the MCG for the right to play in a Grand Final. A match that has gone down in footy folklore thanks to that tackle.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers
programme.desc: 30 Minute Thrillers brings you Collingwood's finest hour from the 2014 season. Coming off 3 losses, the Pies were expected to struggle against their more fancied opponents, but would hold on for a thrilling victory.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers
programme.desc: Geelong looked to have the game won when it led by 4 goals in the last quarter, only for Fremantle to storm back into contention and for David Mundy, to have a shot after the siren.

programme.title: Game of the Year
programme.desc: AFL has produced many memorable games over it's history, Fox Footy have narrowed it down to the best game of each year.

programme.title: Incredible Comebacks
programme.desc: Is there anything better than when a team looks down and out but then suddenly they flip the script and stage an incredible comeback, here are some of the best.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Dermie Delivers
programme.desc: In this episode, Dermie Delivers, Grand Final Heroes. Marvel at the feats of Gary Ablett's 9 goals in 1989 and Darren Jarman's 5 goals from 1998.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The high-flying Swans are back after the bye as they welcome Geelong to their SCG fortress.

programme.title: AFLW
programme.desc: These old rivals meet again with the Demons needing to win to keep their faint finals hopes alive.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Bombers host the Blues at the MCG in a blockbuster clash that will shape the top eight.

programme.title: AFLW
programme.desc: Port Adelaide is aiming for three in a row and a chance to enter the top eight when it hosts Collingwood at Alberton Oval on Thursday night.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: Richmond farewells Dustin Martin, Dylan Grimes and Marlion Pickett in front of the Tigers faithful, as they host the Suns at the MCG.

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: The Lions host the Bombers in a Saturday night blockbuster at The Gabba - can they secure a Top 4 spot in the race to the Finals?

programme.title: AFL Mini
programme.desc: The Swans have locked away top-spot, but before they embark on their September campaign they host the Crows looking to finish their season on a high.

programme.title: Best Games Ever
programme.desc: The 90s the decade that delivered. There would be three new teams, for the first time non-Victorian clubs would take premiership honours and it was a decade of goalkicking maestros Jason Dunstall, Gary Ablett and Tony Lockett.
